问HN：谁在招聘？ （2026 年 4 月）

Ask HN: Who is hiring? (April 2026)

news.ycombinator.com 作者 whoishiring 分数 203 评论 167 2026/04/01 23:01
打开 HN 原帖

正文（中文）

请说明位置并包含用于远程工作的 REMOTE、REMOTE（美国） 或类似（如果国家/地区受到限制），以及 ONSITE（如果远程工作受到限制） 不是 一个选项。

仅当您个人是招聘公司的成员时才请发帖——否 招聘公司或招聘委员会。每个公司一个职位。如果不是家喻户晓的名字 解释一下你的公司是做什么的。

请仅在您积极填补职位空缺并做出承诺的情况下发帖 回复申请人。

评论者：请勿回复招聘帖子进行投诉 某事。这里是题外话。

读者：如果您个人对这份工作感兴趣，请仅发送电子邮件。

搜索者： 尝试一下 https://nthesis.ai/public/hn-who-is-hiring, http://nchelluri.github.io/hnjobs/, https://hnjobs.emilburzo.com, 或这个（非官方）Chrome 扩展： https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/hn-hiring-pro/mpfal...。

不要错过另一个细线： 谁想被录用？ https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47601858

Please state the location and include REMOTE for remote work, REMOTE (US) or similar if the country is restricted, and ONSITE when remote work is not an option.

Please only post if you personally are part of the hiring company—no recruiting firms or job boards. One post per company. If it isn't a household name, explain what your company does.

Please only post if you are actively filling a position and are committed to replying to applicants.

Commenters: please don't reply to job posts to complain about something. It's off topic here.

Readers: please only email if you are personally interested in the job.

Searchers: try https://nthesis.ai/public/hn-who-is-hiring, http://nchelluri.github.io/hnjobs/, https://hnjobs.emilburzo.com, or this (unofficial) Chrome extension: https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/hn-hiring-pro/mpfal....

Don't miss this other fine thread: Who wants to be hired? https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47601858

向量|软件工程师、高级研究工程师|纽约市 (FiDi) |现场 |全职|签证赞助

CVector 构建的软件可为每个能源和制造工厂带来实时经济优化和人工智能预测。我们集成实时数据可视化和分析，帮助发电站、化工厂和其他关键基础设施在快速变化的环境中做出明智的决策。您将帮助创建直观、强大的网络应用程序、机器学习模型和后端系统，塑造直接影响工业运营和能源可靠性的工具。构建人工智能代理系统，自动预见即将出现的问题并提供可能的解决方案。

CVector 最近筹集了 500 万美元种子资金，请在 TechCrunch 上了解更多信息： https://techcrunch.com/2026/01/26/ai-startup-cvector-raises-...

全栈和后端软件工程师：我们正在寻找一位热情的软件工程师，能够在我们的堆栈（Python、Typescript、React、Supabase、MQTT、TimescaleDB、PostgreSQL、AWS、FastAPI）中轻松工作，或者专门研究我们的后端基础设施。

高级研究工程师：候选人应具有机器学习和使用 Python 进行分析的经验。

请通过 jnapoli+hn@cvector.com 与我联系

CVector | Software Engineers, Senior Research Engineer | New York City (FiDi) | ONSITE | Full-time | VISA SPONSORSHIP

CVector builds software to bring real time economic optimization and AI prediction to every energy and manufacturing plant. We integrate real-time data visualization and analytics to help power generation stations, chemical plants, and other critical infrastructure make informed decisions in rapidly changing environments. You'll help create intuitive, robust web apps, machine learning models and backend systems, shaping tools that directly impact industrial operations and energy reliability. Build AI agent systems that automatically foresee upcoming problems and provide possible solutions.

CVector recently raised $5M seed, read more on TechCrunch: https://techcrunch.com/2026/01/26/ai-startup-cvector-raises-...

Full Stack and Backend Software Engineers: We're looking for a passionate Software Engineers comfortable working across our stack (Python, Typescript, React, Supabase, MQTT, TimescaleDB, PostgreSQL, AWS, FastAPI) or someone to specialize in our backend infrastructure.

Senior Research Engineer: Candidates should be experienced with machine learning, and analysis using Python.

Reach out to me at jnapoli+hn@cvector.com

Promptless 构建了自动更新面向客户的文档的人工智能代理。初创公司、CNCF 项目和财富 500 强公司都使用我们。 YC 获得了来自顶级风投和天使投资人的种子轮支持。

这是一个独一的角色。您将负责 Promptless 的文档实践：让客户加入该平台，构建人工智能辅助文档的方法，并提高我们作为使文档团队更高效的公司的声誉。想想顶级咨询公司的实践领导，除了领域是文档，杠杆是人工智能。

您应该在技术文档（开发人员文档、API 参考文献、支持内容）方面拥有丰富的经验，能够轻松阅读代码，并对突破 LLM 辅助写作的界限感到兴奋。您将从头开始构建此功能，因此创业心态是关键。

Promptless (YC) | Founding Docs Practice Lead | San Francisco (Onsite) | Full-time | $140k–$200k + equity

Promptless builds AI agents that automatically update customer-facing documentation. Startups, CNCF projects, and Fortune 500 companies use us. YC-backed with a seed round from top VCs and angels.

This is a one-of-one role. You'll own the documentation practice at Promptless: onboarding customers onto the platform, building the methodology for AI-assisted documentation, and growing our reputation as the company that makes docs teams more effective. Think practice lead at a top consulting firm, except the domain is docs and the leverage is AI.

You should have deep experience in technical documentation (developer docs, API references, support content), be comfortable reading code, and be excited about pushing the boundaries of LLM-assisted writing. You'll be building this function from scratch, so an entrepreneurial mindset is key.

Read more: https://promptless.ai/jobs#founding-docs-practice-lead

Email us directly: founders@promptless.ai (mention HN!)

Same deal. Email us directly: founders@promptless.ai (mention HN!)

你们的招聘系统出了问题。我与一位申请的朋友分享了这篇文章，但他们立即遭到拒绝。这是一位数据工程师，拥有 4 年以上的堆栈经验，并且拥有核工程学位。也许不是最终聘用的人，但显然不是你应该自动拒绝的人。

我是 Alex，River 的创始人兼首席执行官。我还编写了第一行代码并仍然发布 PR。

River 是一家客户至上的比特币金融机构，开发了人们每天用来储蓄比特币和美元消费的金融应用程序。我们托管超过 25,000 枚比特币，为美国各地的个人和企业提供服务，并且盈利。我们每月发布储备金的加密证明，每年发布我们公司的财务状况。

以下是我们的工程团队正在开展的工作：

  - Real-time Bitcoin and USD payments, trading, and settlement on an Elixir monolith with a unified GraphQL API
  - Next-generation Bitcoin custody with quorum signing, key ceremonies, and geo-redundant infrastructure
  - Scaling our ML/AI systems (Python, PyTorch, XGBoost, LLMs) to automate operations and tackle fraud/risk
  - A ground-up React and React Native rewrite of our consumer app
  - Porting our Lightning Network infrastructure from Go into Elixir
我们正在招聘：

  - Senior Software Engineer (React, Full-stack) | $150K-$220K
  - Staff Software Engineer (Elixir) | $200K-$250K
  - Staff Software Engineer (ML/AI) | $200K-$250K

River | Senior + Staff Engineers (Elixir, React, ML/AI) | SF or NYC or REMOTE (US, Europe, South America) | Full-Time | $150K-$250K + equity | https://jobs.ashbyhq.com/river

I'm Alex, founder and CEO of River. I also wrote the first line of code and still ship PRs.

River is a client-first Bitcoin-only financial institution building the financial app people use every day to save in bitcoin and spend in dollars. We custody over 25,000 BTC, serve individuals and businesses across the U.S., and are profitable. We publish cryptographic proof of reserves monthly and our company financials annually.

Here's what our engineering team is working on:

  - Real-time Bitcoin and USD payments, trading, and settlement on an Elixir monolith with a unified GraphQL API
  - Next-generation Bitcoin custody with quorum signing, key ceremonies, and geo-redundant infrastructure
  - Scaling our ML/AI systems (Python, PyTorch, XGBoost, LLMs) to automate operations and tackle fraud/risk
  - A ground-up React and React Native rewrite of our consumer app
  - Porting our Lightning Network infrastructure from Go into Elixir
We're hiring:

  - Senior Software Engineer (React, Full-stack) | $150K-$220K
  - Staff Software Engineer (Elixir) | $200K-$250K
  - Staff Software Engineer (ML/AI) | $200K-$250K

Rinse 为美国和加拿大 12 个大都市区的客户提供干洗和洗衣递送服务。我们拥有先进的物流优化软件、精致的消费产品和坚实的业务基础。我们现在已经有十多年的历史了——这是一家稳定但不断发展和创新的公司。

我们的工程团队分布在美国和国际各地，多年来一直完全处于远程状态，但如果您愿意，可以在上述城市提供办公桌。

我们向新毕业的工程师或更高级的工程师开放，只要他们符合我们的标准。我们对真正的全栈工程师特别感兴趣，他们拥有强大的 React / Typescript / CSS 技能，可以补充 Python / Django 环境中的舒适度。我们还在寻找具有利用人工智能自动化复杂操作流程经验的工程师。

本赛季，我们对新毕业生或初级工程师特别感兴趣，以充实团队。

您将加入一个高素质的团队，协作、诚实和开放的沟通是我们所做一切的核心。

RINSE | REMOTE or San Francisco, Los Angeles, Chicago, Boston, New York City, New Jersey, Seattle, Austin, Toronto, or Washington DC | Software Engineer | Full-Time | Salary: $80k-$200k USD | https://www.rinse.com

Rinse provides dry cleaning and laundry delivery services to customers in twelve metropolitan areas in the US and Canada. We have sophisticated logistics optimization software, a polished consumer product, and firm business fundamentals. We're now over a decade old - this is a stable, yet consistently growing and innovating, company.

Our engineering team is distributed across the United States and internationally, and has been entirely remote for years now, but a desk can be provided in the above cities if you'd prefer.

We're open to both newly-graduated engineers or more senior engineers, provided they meet our bar. We're particularly interested in true full-stack engineers, with strong React / Typescript / CSS skills to complement comfort in a Python / Django environment. We're also seeking engineers with experience leveraging AI to automate complex operational processes.

This season, we're particularly interested in new grads or junior engineers, to round out the team.

You will join a high-caliber team where collaboration, honesty, and open communication are at the core of everything we do.

Search term bingo: Logistics, Django, Python, Optimization, React, React Native, Postgres, Mobile Engineer, Automation, Delivery, OR-tools, Forecasting

Head of Engineering & Infrastructure | Full-Time | Remote | $182k - $272k USD - https://fetlife.com/jobs/head_of_engineering_and_infrastruct...

---

Applications: Rails, Vue.js/Typescript, Rust

passive 2026/04/02 00:41
两个月前，我申请了工程和基础设施主管的职位，但几乎立即就遭到了相当普遍的拒绝，这表明我已被自动筛选掉。

从那时起，我稍微清理了我的 LinkedIn，所以也许这会有所帮助？

鉴于您仍在寻找，并且从技术上讲，它与我上一个角色几乎相同，似乎值得进行对话。

I applied to the Head of Engineering and Infrastructure role two months ago, and got a fairly generic rejection almost immediately that suggested I had been automatically screened out.

I've cleaned up my LinkedIn a bit since then, so perhaps that would help?

Given that you're still looking, and technically it's almost identical to my last role, seems like it's worth having a conversation about.

铜首页|资深嵌入式系统工程师 |现场（加利福尼亚州伯克利）

Copper Home（原名 Channing Street Copper）生产用于家庭电气化的电池集成感应电器——我们从炉灶开始，通过将能量储存在日常产品中来实现脱碳。

固件团队规模较小，拥有应用程序固件、设备连接、自动化测试、制造工具以及用于 OTA 更新和车队遥测的 MQTT 后端。

我们正在招聘一名 嵌入式系统工程师 专注于 Charlie 电磁炉系列的核心固件架构。

在此角色中，您可以：

- 拥有我们嵌入式平台的主要部分和未来产品的原型。

- 领导设备连接（Wi-Fi、BLE、OTA、配置、故障恢复）和能源管理的改进。

- 发展车队管理、遥测和远程管理/更新系统，重点关注大规模的稳健性和成本效率。

- 通过设计评审和日常技术协作指导工程师。

技术栈：C 和 Python； ESP-IDF 上的 FreeRTOS； 802.11、BLE、CAN； MQTT； AWS

薪资：$182k–$210k + 股权

问题？给我发送电子邮件（<用户名>@copperhome.com）或在此处回复。

更多详情并申请： https://copperhome.com/pages/jobs?gh_jid=4119303007

Copper Home | Staff Embedded Systems Engineer | ONSITE (Berkeley, CA)

Copper Home (fka Channing Street Copper) builds battery-integrated induction appliances for home electrification — we're making decarbonization accessible by putting energy storage inside everyday products, starting with the stove.

The firmware team is small and owns application firmware, device connectivity, automated testing, manufacturing tools, and an MQTT backend for OTA updates and fleet telemetry.

We're hiring a staff embedded systems engineer focused core firmware architecture on the Charlie induction range.

In this role, you may:

- Own major pieces of our embedded platform and prototypes of future products.

- Lead improvements to device connectivity (Wi-Fi, BLE, OTA, provisioning, failure recovery) and energy management.

- Evolve fleet management, telemetry, and remote management/update systems with a focus on robustness and cost efficiency at scale.

- Mentor engineers through design reviews and day-to-day technical collaboration.

Tech stack: C and Python; FreeRTOS on ESP-IDF; 802.11, BLE, CAN; MQTT; AWS

Salary: $182k–$210k + equity

Questions? Send me an email (<username>@copperhome.com) or reply here.

More details and apply: https://copperhome.com/pages/jobs?gh_jid=4119303007

可堆叠|产品工程师 - Web 和 UI |远程（德国/英国）|约 20 人 |全职或兼职

我们在 Kubernetes 上构建了一个开源数据平台。 该产品（Stackable Data Platform - SDP）捆绑了 12 多个开源数据工具（Trino、Apache Kafka、Apache Airflow、Apache Superset 等）并使它们协同工作。 现在一切都只是基础设施即代码。我们需要有人在上面构建一个 UI 层。

恐怕没有模型，没有Figma，没有产品路线图在等着你，只有一堆想法:) 我们都是后端人员，需要有人来负责这个端到端的工作。尝试我们的产品堆栈，找出客户真正需要什么，然后构建它。

Stack（因为我们在没有你的情况下开始了...）：Svelte/SvelteKit、TypeScript、TailwindCSS。 SDP 本身是 K8s 上的 Rust、Java、Python。 一年发布三版。不是SaaS。质量很重要。

100% 偏远，仅限德国（可能是英国），没有其他国家/地区，抱歉。没有 Scrum，最少的会议。面试过程通常只有两次对话。 由于我正在度假，所以该职位尚未出现在我们的主页上。 发送邮件至recruiting@stackable.tech，我会在下周回复您。请在邮件中注明HN。我的个人邮件也在我的 HN 个人资料中。我是联合创始人兼首席技术官。

https://github.com/stackabletech/ | https://stackable.tech

Stackable | Product Engineer - Web & UI | Remote (Germany/UK) | ~20 people | Full or part-time

We build an open source data platform on Kubernetes. The product (Stackable Data Platform - SDP) bundles 12+ open source data tools (Trino, Apache Kafka, Apache Airflow, Apache Superset, etc.) and makes them work together. Right now everything is Infrastructure-as-Code only. We need someone to build a UI layer on top.

No mockups, no Figma, no product roadmap waiting for you I'm afraid, just a bunch of ideas :) We're all backend people and need someone to own this end to end. Play around with our product stack, figure out what customers actually need, build it.

Stack (because we got started without you...): Svelte/SvelteKit, TypeScript, TailwindCSS. SDP itself is Rust, Java, Python on K8s. Three releases a year. Not SaaS. Quality matters.

100% remote, Germany (UK possible) only, no other countries, sorry. No Scrum, minimal meetings. Interview process is usually just two conversations. The position isn't on our homepage yet as I'm on vacation. Send a mail to recruiting@stackable.tech and I'll get back to you next week. Please mention HN in your mail. My personal mail is also in my HN profile. I'm the Co-founder and CTO.

https://github.com/stackabletech/ | https://stackable.tech

Puma.tech | Remote-first with PST overlap | iOS/MacOS, Android, Ai/ML, Growth | https://puma.tech

Hi all, I’m Yuriy, founder of Puma.tech. Prev. worked at Cloudant (YC S08), Meteor (YC S11), Parse (YC S11, Facebook/Meta), and explored AI/ML (computer vision for self-driving cars).

We have 3 products:

1. https://PumaBrowser.com – iOS & Android mobile browser with built in LLMs & Wallets. Private by design. 1m+ downloads.

2. https://PumaAI.com – privacy layer between you and LLM providers.

3. https://PumaClaw.com – (just starting to build) easier way to run and manage your Claws from the phone.

Help building either or all is much appreciated.

Open Roles: Eng (iOS/MacOS, Android, Ai/ML, Browser Extensions), Based Social Media Intern; Internships: Eng, Design, Growth

We’ve raised a few rounds from some of the best builders in crypto and ai:

Protocol Labs (YC S14), Chris Larsen (Ripple), Anatoly Yakovenko (Solana), Illia Polosukhin (NEAR Protocol), Sridhar Ramaswamy (Snowflake CEO), Jason Warner (poolside.ai, ex-GitHub CTO), Don Ho (Orange DAO, Quantstamp W18), Evil Rabbit (Vercel), John Phamous (SF Compute) and other amazing builders.

How to Apply: email careers+hn [at] puma.tech with your GitHub, a note on what you're most proud of building and what you'd like to build next.

Thank you!

LiveMap 是一家获得资助的初创公司，其愿景是构建下一代地图应用程序（想想超个性化的 Google 地图）。其外观仍在探索中，因此我们正在构建原型，将其交付给客户并快速迭代。我们希望聘请一些人来帮助加速这一开发过程。

作为数据工程师，您将设置数据管道，使用产品来识别相关数据集，连接、保留和公开该数据。

使用路由引擎，您将扩展现成的路由引擎 (Graphhopper)，以考虑动态运行时首选项和属性（考虑时间）。

• 路由工程师 - https://tally.so/r/obdAY1

快乐黑客

LiveMap | Geospatial Engineers (Data & Routing) | Full-Time | Switzerland or Remote (CH, EU, UK)

Visa sponsorship is not provided.

LiveMap is a funded startup with a vision to build the next generation of mapping apps (think hyper-personalised Google Maps). How that looks is still being explored so we're building prototypes, getting them into customer hands and iterating quickly. We're looking to bring on a couple of people to help accelerate this development process.

As a data engineer you'll set up a data pipeline, work with product to identify relevant datasets, connect, persist and expose that data.

Working on the routing engine you'll extend off the shelf routing engines (Graphhopper) to take into account dynamic run-time preferences & attributes (think temporal).

Please find more information and application forms at the links:

• Geospatial data/backend engineer - https://tally.so/r/68vdyB

• Routing engineer - https://tally.so/r/obdAY1

Happy hacking

noahho 2026/04/02 03:17
先前实验室|柏林/弗莱堡/纽约|现场 |全职|多重角色

表格为每一个临床试验、金融模型和科学实验提供支持，但深度学习大多忽略了它们。没有自然序列，没有空间结构，没有跨数据集的共享词汇。 LLM 架构不会转移。我们构建了 TabPFN，这是第一个真正理解表格数据的基础模型（发表在 Nature 上，下载量超过 300 万次，表格 ML 的新 SOTA）。最困难的问题仍然悬而未决。

模型是产品的一半。另一半——培训基础设施、实时服务、开发者平台、可靠性——是将研究突破转化为企业在生产中信任的东西。我们正在这两个领域进行招聘。

- ML 工程师，培训基础设施 — 拥有 GPU 基础设施、分布式培训性能和开发人员生产力层（CI、实验跟踪、模型注册），使研究保持快速发展。

- 全栈工程师，ML 平台 — 构建将表格基础模型交到用户手中的产品，从数据上传到推理和结果。您将跨前端、后端工作，并直接与研究团队合作，将新模型功能转化为生产功能。

- 研究工程师，基础模型——设计实验、运行消融、构建培训基础设施、撰写论文。这里的研究工程师不是支持科学家——他们是科学团队。

- ML 工程师，云平台 — 设计和扩展核心基础设施，以服务和微调生产中的基础模型。尽早制定架构决策，而不是继承它们。

还招聘：研究科学家、应用科学家、前向部署机器学习工程师、开发者关系工程师、AE、BDR。

从数千名申请者中选出的20人团队。来自 Jane Street、Google、CERN、G-Research 的背景。由 Frank Hutter 领导，Yann LeCun 和 Bernhard Schölkopf 提供建议。在 Hugging Face、DeepMind 和 Black Forest Labs、XTX Ventures 和 Balderton 领导者的支持下。

所有角色： https://jobs.priorlabs.ai

Prior Labs | Berlin / Freiburg / NYC | ONSITE | Full-time | Multiple Roles

Tables power every clinical trial, financial model, and scientific experiment, but deep learning has mostly ignored them. No natural sequence, no spatial structure, no shared vocabulary across datasets. LLM architectures don't transfer. We built TabPFN, the first foundation model that actually understands tabular data (published in Nature, 3M+ downloads, new SOTA for tabular ML). The hardest problems are still open.

The model is half the product. The other half - training infrastructure, real-time serving, developer platform, reliability - is what turns a research breakthrough into something enterprises trust in production. We're hiring across both.

- ML Engineer, Training Infrastructure — Own GPU infrastructure, distributed training performance, and the developer productivity layer (CI, experiment tracking, model registry) that keeps research moving fast.

- Full Stack Engineer, ML Platform — Build the product that puts tabular foundation models in users' hands, from data upload through inference and results. You'll work across frontend, backend, and directly with the research team to turn new model capabilities into production features.

- Research Engineer, Foundation Model — Design experiments, run ablations, build training infrastructure, contribute to papers. Research engineers here aren't supporting scientists — they are the science team.

- ML Engineer, Cloud Platform — Design and scale the core infrastructure for serving and finetuning foundation models in production. Early enough that you're making the architecture decisions, not inheriting them.

Also hiring: Research Scientist, Applied Scientist, Forward Deployed ML Engineer, Developer Relations Engineer, AE, BDR.

20-person team selected from thousands applicants. Backgrounds from Jane Street, Google, CERN, G-Research. Led by Frank Hutter, advised by Yann LeCun and Bernhard Schölkopf. With backing from leaders at Hugging Face, DeepMind, and Black Forest Labs, XTX Ventures & Balderton.

All roles: https://jobs.priorlabs.ai

* 如果您想了解我们的工作方式、薪酬等详细信息，我们有一本公共手册 (posthog.com/handbook)。

red_balloon 2026/04/02 05:40
红气球安全|安全研究人员、软件工程师 |纽约市、北弗吉尼亚州 |现场、混合 |全职、实习生（付费）|需要美国公民 | https://redballoonsecurity.com

我们是一支由专家研究人员和工程师组成的团队，专注于保护嵌入式设备。我们与关键行业的合作伙伴以及政府资助的研究项目（例如 DARPA）合作。对我们来说，“全栈”不仅仅停留在后端代码；还包括后端代码。这意味着熟悉操作系统、固件和网络信号。如果您学得很快，喜欢独立解决以前从未解决过的棘手技术问题，那么您将会在这里取得成功。

日常任务可能包括：

* 拆解我们实验室中的设备，对其固件进行逆向工程，并查找安全漏洞

* 开发用于硬件逆向工程的自动化机器人平台（定制硬件、视觉模型、用户界面等）

* 挂钩和修补 RTOS 内核函数以执行防御设备完整性验证代码，而不违反实时要求

* 构建可扩展的服务器，用于跨数千个并发连接处理数百万条设备遥测消息

* 维护开源逆向工程工具（如 OFRAK https://ofrak.com）并为黑客会议制作有趣的演示（例如我们为 2023 年 DEF CON 构建的这款网页游戏 https://ofrak.com/tetris/）

我们的主要办公室位于曼哈顿，但我们正在弗吉尼亚州北部建造一个新办公室。需要美国公民身份。如果您拥有有效的安全许可或愿意获得许可，即可获得奖励积分。

https://www.linkedin.com/jobs/view/4367488549

Red Balloon Security | Security Researchers, Software Engineers | NYC, Northern Virginia | ONSITE, HYBRID | Full-time, Interns (paid) | US Citizenship Required | https://redballoonsecurity.com

We are a team of expert researchers and engineers focused on securing embedded devices. We work with partners across critical industries, and on government-funded research programs (think DARPA). "Full-stack" for us doesn't just stop at back end code; it means being comfortable with operating systems, firmware, and signals going over the wire. You'll succeed here if you are a quick learner who loves working independently on tough, technical problems nobody has ever solved before.

Day-to-day tasks might include:

* Tearing apart a device in our lab, reverse engineering its firmware, and finding security vulnerabilities

* Developing an automated, robotic platform for hardware reverse engineering (custom hardware, vision models, user interfaces, etc.)

* Hooking and patching RTOS kernel functions to execute defensive device integrity validation code, without violating real-time requirements

* Building scalable servers for processing millions of device telemetry messages across thousands of concurrent connections

* Maintaining open-source reverse engineering tools (like OFRAK https://ofrak.com) and cooking up fun demos for hacker conferences (like this web game we built for DEF CON in 2023 https://ofrak.com/tetris/)

Our main office is in Manhattan, but we are building out a new office in Northern Virginia. US citizenship required. Bonus points if you have an active security clearance, or are willing to get one.

https://www.linkedin.com/jobs/view/4367488549

jeremysalwen 2026/04/02 04:23
抗击疟疾基金会|高级软件工程师|远程（英国）|全职

AMF 致力于利用经过杀虫剂处理的蚊帐，以极具成本效益的方式对抗疟疾。每年有数亿人感染疟疾，其中五十万人死亡，还有更多人衰弱或致残。十多年来，GiveWell 等独立慈善评估机构将 AMF 列为世界上最具成本效益的慈善机构之一，因为我们长期且经过充分研究的记录预防了数亿疟疾病例。

我们的技术团队只有几个人，而且都是远程的。我们的软件对于我们所做的慈善工作至关重要；这是我们在其他慈善机构中脱颖而出的方式之一，它使我们能够以新颖的方式自动化、分析和验证我们的工作。 我们的技术堆栈包括 C# .NET、Blazor 和 Python。

如果您是一位有兴趣做出改变的英国高级 SWE，请通过电子邮件与我联系，网址为 againstmalaria.com

Against Malaria Foundation | Senior Software Engineer | Remote (UK) | Full Time

The AMF works to fight malaria in an extremely cost effective way with insecticide treated bed-nets. Every year hundreds of millions of people will be infected with malaria, and half a million of them will die, with many more being debilitated or disabled. Independent charity evaluators, such as GiveWell, have ranked the AMF as one of the most cost-effective charities in the world for over a decade, due to our long and well-studied track record preventing hundreds of millions of cases of malaria.

Our tech team is just a couple people, and all-remote. Our software is essential to the charity work we do; it is one of the ways we stand out among other charities, by allowing us to automate, analyze, and validate our work in novel ways. Our tech stack includes C# .NET, Blazor, and Python.

If you are a senior SWE in the UK who is interested in making a difference, please reach out to me by email at my first name at againstmalaria.com

身份实验室| https://wellfound.com/jobs/4037860-creative-director-at-a-po... |远程|全职

Identity Labs 在 Twitter 上产生了 2B+ 的浏览量。我们曾与 Bryan Johnson、Chamath Palihapitiya、Tony Fadell、a16z 的合伙人、Kleiner Perkins 的合伙人以及 YC 创始人合作。我们是一个 15 人的小团队。

如果 21 世纪是由 100 个有影响力的想法来定义的，那么 Identity Labs 希望能够帮助推广其中 10 个想法。

我们相信，每一位做出了巨大贡献的创始人都拥有五篇保罗·格雷厄姆级别的论文。我们的工作是找到这些论文并分发它们。

我们正在招聘一名创意总监。

你的工作就是和一个创建了十亿美元公司的人坐在一起，聊两个小时，找出谈话中的哪个想法会让 1000 万人停止在 Twitter 上滚动，然后写下来。

这是知识分子的争论加上长篇新闻报道，再加上对推特上传播的内容和原因的深入了解。

我们的同比增长率超过 1500%。当创意总监成长为合作伙伴角色时，他们的薪水可以在 2 年内增加 5 倍。

https://wellfound.com/jobs/4037860-creative-director-at-a-po...

Identity Labs | https://wellfound.com/jobs/4037860-creative-director-at-a-po... | Remote | Full Time

Identity Labs has generated 2B+ views across Twitter. We've worked with Bryan Johnson, Chamath Palihapitiya, Tony Fadell, partners at a16z, partners at Kleiner Perkins, and YC founders. We are a small team of 15 people.

If the 21st century gets defined by 100 influential ideas, Identity Labs wants to be instrumental in popularizing 10 of them.

We believe every founder who's built something massive has five Paul Graham level essays inside them. Our job is to find those essays and give them distribution.

We're hiring a Creative Director.

Your job is to sit with someone who built a billion dollar company, talk for two hours, figure out which idea from that conversation will make 10 million people stop scrolling on Twitter, then write it.

It's intellectual sparring plus longform journalism plus an obsessive understanding of what spreads on Twitter and why.

We're growing at 1500%+ YoY. A Creative Director can 5x their salary within 2 years as they grow into a Partner role.

https://wellfound.com/jobs/4037860-creative-director-at-a-po...

薄荷MCP |创始工程师/创始GTM |旧金山湾区（现场）

MintMCP 帮助企业安全地利用代理完成更多工作（例如，围绕 MCP 工具和代理（如 Claude Code / Cowork 等）进行治理）。 我们正在构建一个 MCP 网关作为基础，其中包含企业所需的适当抽象，以允许长期运行的代理在整个组织中安全部署；组织可以轻松、明确地限制代理可以执行的操作的影响范围，同时为其提供正确的工具组合以使其发挥作用。

我们是一个由数十名代理组成的小团队：我们的公司在我们为企业构建的基础设施上运营。 我们正在寻找代理转发工程师和 GTM 人员来帮助解决扩展问题、维持最高的安全标准、使代理和 MCP 可用且有用。

我们现在正在解决的问题：代理身份、工具资源的 ReBaC、私有 MCP 服务器的可扩展托管，以及与基础 MCP 网关层垂直集成的代理平台。

如果您有基础设施、安全、代理和 MCP 方面的经验，您可能会发现我们正在解决的问题令人兴奋！

您可以在这里查看更多内容： https://www.mintmcp.com/hiring。 您的代理可能会发现该页面很有趣！

MintMCP | Founding Engineer / Founding GTM | SF Bay Area (ONSITE)

MintMCP helps enterprises safely do more with Agents (e.g, governance around MCP tools and agents like Claude Code / Cowork, and others). We're building an MCP gateway as the foundation with the proper abstractions that enterprises need to allow long running agents to be safely deployed across an entire organization; organizations can easily and clearly limit the blast radius of what an agent can do, while giving it the right combination of tools to be useful.

We're a small team of humans with dozens of agents: our company operates on the infrastructure we build for enterprises. We're looking for agent-forward engineers and GTM folks to help solve scaling problems, maintain the highest standards for security, make agents and MCPs usable and useful.

Problems we're solving right now: Agent Identity, ReBaC for tool resources, scalable hosting of private MCP servers, and our agent platform that vertically integrates with the foundational MCP gateway layer.

If you have experience in infra, security, and agents, and MCPs, you might find the problems we're working on exciting!

You can see more here: https://www.mintmcp.com/hiring. Your agent might find the page interesting!

Bloomberg | Senior Software Engineer | Hybrid (NYC) | Full-time | $160k - $240k USD + bonus

Every day, Bloomberg’s clients rely on secure and seamless access to our products. Our team makes that possible by building infrastructure that verifies identities for both clients and employees. We design systems that are fast, resilient, and highly available, capable of handling large volumes of authentication traffic around the clock.

We are embarking on an initiative to modernize and unify Bloomberg’s authentication landscape. Your work will directly affect the experience of Bloomberg’s employees and clients worldwide.

You'll need to have

- Experience guiding the architecture of large scale authentication systems.

- Experience developing or operating Open ID Providers, Authorization Servers, and Identity Providers

- Deep understanding of OAuth, OIDC, SAML, FIDO or similar protocols

You can expect to

- Lead design and development of Bloomberg’s next-generation authentication and MFA systems, aligning with future product goals

- Create scalable, end-to-end identity solutions across web, API, and proprietary technologies

- Collaborate with cross-functional partners across product, design, and engineering

Apply: https://bloomberg.avature.net/careers/Public?jobId=17745

我们正在构建深度、垂直整合的技术系统，以解决美国医疗保健的基本问题——世界上最大的市场（5T 美元）。我们使用 AWS、K8s、React 和 Rust，但不要求之前有具体的使用经验。我们来教你！

AI x Healthcare Startup | Boston, MA Onsite | Full-time | Early Engineer

We're looking for a backend-leaning fullstack dev. You will be one of the first engineers outside of the founding team. Here is a bit more about us: We're a seed stage AI startup backed by top tier investors. We're on a mission to ensure every patient gets covered for the care they need and every doctor gets paid for the work they do.

We’re building deep, vertically integrated technology systems to solve fundamental problems in US healthcare - the biggest market in the world ($5T). We use AWS, K8s, React, and Rust but there is no requirement to have prior experience with them specifically. We'll teach you!

We are a founding team made up of ex-YC, Amazon, Meta, Microsoft, and Harvard Business School with previous successful exits.

You’ll own entire product areas and be expected to play a true full-stack role, with the ability to go from customer need to end-state product. You’ll work directly with the CTO at the edge of what's possible with LLMs and agentic systems applied to a hard domain. You'll contribute to technical strategy, make real architectural decisions, and write vast amounts of production code with AI first developer workflows. Most importantly, the technology you build will have real impact on real people - clinics staying open, clinicians getting paid, patients getting care.

This is an opportunity to work in a fast paced, high ownership environment while solving real problems in healthcare.

We're happy to share more details on the role in person/on zoom. Please fill out this form if interested!

https://wgwx7h7be0p.typeform.com/to/LV0t8OjI

FUTO | Software Engineers | Austin, TX | Remote or Onsite | Full Time FUTO is an organization dedicated to developing, both through in-house engineering and investment, technologies that frustrate centralization and industry consolidation. Our work consists of a combination of in-house engineering projects, targeted investments, generous grants, and multi-media public education efforts. We are hiring for a few of our projects, Immich and Grayjay.

Grayjay is a privacy first media application that lets users follow creators, not platforms. The app aggregates content from multiple video sources including YouTube, Rumble, Twitch, PeerTube, Odysee, and more, into a single unified experience. Grayjay gives users full control over their viewing experience.

您将致力于通过引用、代理编排和工具调用、模型服务基础设施以及第三方 API 集成对异构语料库进行检索。分层检索、更繁重的前期文档处理和自定义代理工具有很大的试验空间。随着时间的推移，我们将扩展到微调、更直接的计算管理和一些可解释性工作。

堆栈：Python/FastAPI、React、PostgreSQL/pgvector、AWS/OpenTofu。寻找具有几年构建生产系统经验的人员。

如果您有兴趣，请发送电子邮件至 talati@getcultivate.ai！

Cultivate AI | Senior Software Engineers | Durham, NC | Hybrid (open to remote)

We're building an AI platform for credit unions. A variety of tools (third party integrations + RAG) backed by multiple LLM options, including OLMo, running in our own AWS infrastructure. We're a small team (I'm CTO and our first technical hire) so you'd have real ownership over the AI stack and architecture.

You'd work on retrieval over heterogeneous corpora with citations, agent orchestration and tool calling, model serving infra, and third party API integration. There's a lot of room to experiment with hierarchical retrieval, heavier upfront document processing, and custom agent tooling. Over time we're going to expand into fine tuning, more direct compute management, and some interpretability work.

Stack: Python/FastAPI, React, PostgreSQL/pgvector, AWS/OpenTofu. Looking for someone with a few years of experience building production systems.

Email me at talati@getcultivate.ai if you're interested!

泽德工业|北美、南美、欧洲 远程 | https://zed.dev/ Zed 是一家为开发人员服务、由开发人员创建的公司。我们的三位创始人都花了数年时间在一线编写软件，并且几乎每天都在这样做。

我们已经筹集了 4200 万美元来支持我们的最终愿景，即一种软件协作的新方式，其中有关代码的对话仍然与代码本身相关，而不是与老化的快照联系在一起或分散在不同的工具中。第一步是创建一个高质量的编辑器作为用户界面。现在，这项新投资让我们能够扩大规模，以应对计划的下一阶段。我们正在开发一种基于操作的新型版本控制，以编辑级别的粒度增量跟踪代码的演变，并且我们正在将其集成到 Zed 中，以使与代理和队友的协作成为编码体验的一流部分。

Zed Industries | North America, South America, Europe REMOTE | https://zed.dev/ Zed is a company for developers, by developers. All 3 of our founders have spent years in the trenches writing software and still do it almost every single day.

We've raised $42M to support our ultimate vision, a new way to collaborate on software, where conversations about code remain connected to the code itself, instead of being tied to aging snapshots or scattered across different tools. The first step was creating a high-quality editor to serve as the user interface. Now this new investment lets us expand to tackle the next phase of our plan. We're developing a new kind of operation-based version control that incrementally tracks the evolution of your code with edit-level granularity, and we're integrating it into Zed to make collaboration, both with agents and teammates, a first-class part of the coding experience.

What we look for and how we build - https://zed.dev/blog/hiring

AI Rust Engineer - https://zed.dev/jobs/ai-engineer

Product Designer - https://zed.dev/jobs/product-designer

Tufalabs 是苏黎世的一家独立人工智能研究实验室，专注于高影响力的学术型人工智能研究和大规模法学硕士开发。我们关心计算（目前有 6 个 DGX B200、2 个 NVL72 GB300 传入）。我们的使命是推动人工智能科学的前沿，同时开源成果并构建工程力量来训练前沿语言模型的前后。最终目标是自动化人工智能研究，重点关注极限的一致性和安全性。

我们只能为具有欧盟国籍的人提供签证担保。该职位是现场的，全职的。 我们是自筹资金的，我称之为“自我推进的机器学习”：我将机器学习应用到了很酷的领域，并以这种方式获得了回报。我可以私下提供更多细节。 如果有兴趣，请给我发电子邮件至 tufalabs.ai 的 Benjamin

Tufalabs | Senior research/engineers | Full Time | Zurich, Onsite | 100-200k CHF | https://tufalabs.ai/ Our current focus is arc-agi 3. We recently hired the top #2 kaggler to join that effort. We are looking for people deeply passionate about AI research. I am steering our work culture towards "live-to-work": If you wouldn't be doing AI research working somewhere else, then it is not a good fit. If you don't find yourself naturally reading about AI papers or doing random AI projects in your free time, then it is not a good fit. We have high expectations and a generous equity structure to match.

Tufalabs is an independent AI research lab in Zurich, focused on high-impact academic-style AI research and large-scale LLM development. We care about compute (currently, 6× DGX B200, 2× NVL72 GB300 incoming). Our mission is to push the frontier of AI science while open-sourcing results and building the engineering muscle to pre- and post-train cutting-edge language models. The ultimate goal is automating AI research, with a strong focus on alignment and safety in the limit.

We can only sponsor visas for people with EU nationality. The position is onsite, fulltime. We are self-funded, from what i call "self-propelled machine learning": I applied ML to cool domains and made returns that way. I can give more details about this privately. If interested, email me at benjamin at tufalabs.ai

我们正在寻找具有现代 Web 技术经验的高级工程师（我们的一些关键技术构建模块是 Typescript、Rust、wasm、WebGL）以及强烈的主人翁意识。有计算几何、计算机图形或类似经验者优先。这一角色处于解决深层技术基础挑战与交付为人们解决实际问题的产品的交叉点。

Arcol | Senior Software Engineer | NYC, SF, or Remote (US/Canada) | Full-time

Arcol (arcol.io) is a small, high talent density team building the future of building design - a future that's collaborative, fast, and intuitive. We're a web-native, fully collaborative 3d design tool modernizing the experience of architectural design for teams of all sizes.

We're looking for senior engineers with experience in modern web technologies - some of our key technical building blocks are Typescript, Rust, wasm, WebGL - and a strong ownership mindset. Experience with computational geometry, computer graphics, or similar a strong plus. This role sits at the intersection of solving deep technical foundational challenges with shipping a product that solves real problems for real people.

分数人工智能 |职员/首席软件工程师 |旧金山、纽约、北卡罗来纳州、迪拜 |现场

我们是一支由经验丰富的多面手 SWE 和人工智能爱好者组成的团队，正在为企业客户构建定制人工智能代理。无需人工智能经验：我们正在积极努力成为世界上学习应用人工智能的最佳场所。

我是弗兰克，这里的一名工程师。这是我工作过的第一家服务型公司，所以对于那些有类似经历的人来说，这是我迄今为止真正喜欢的：

* 学习速度超快。每年 3-4 个客户项目，每个项目都有不同的技术堆栈、产品、行业和架构。大量学习资源，包括入职时的完整人工智能工程训练营。

* 我们的项目通常具有高优先级，并由知名高管赞助。项目对使用或利润产生真正影响的路径要短得多。

*我们“在淘金热期间出售镐”。当人工智能找到下一个杀手级应用时，我们将是第一个知道它的人。

我们正在现场招聘员工+瑞典工程师，并在旧金山、纽约、北卡罗来纳州达勒姆和迪拜设有办事处。请随时直接与我联系 (frank@fractional.ai) 或查看完整的职位发布：

https://jobs.ashbyhq.com/fractional-ai/1db16198-e91e-425d-83...

Fractional AI | Staff/Principal Software Engineer | SF, NY, NC, Dubai | Onsite

We’re a team of experienced generalist SWEs and AI enthusiasts who are building custom AI agents for enterprise clients. No AI experience required: we are actively trying to be the best place in the world to learn applied AI.

I’m Frank, an engineer here. This is the first services-style company I’ve worked at, so for those of you in a similar boat, this is what I’ve really liked so far:

* The learning rate is super fast. 3-4 client projects a year, each with different tech stacks, products, industries, and architectures. Lots of learning resources including a full AI engineering bootcamp when you onboard.

* Our projects are typically high priority and sponsored by prominent executives. The path here for projects to have real impact on usage or bottom line is much shorter.

* We’re “selling pickaxes during the gold rush”. When AI finds its next killer app, we’ll be the first to know about it.

We’re hiring staff+ SWEs onsite with offices in San Francisco, New York, Durham NC, and Dubai. Feel free to reach out to me directly (frank@fractional.ai) or take a look at the full job posting:

https://jobs.ashbyhq.com/fractional-ai/1db16198-e91e-425d-83...

- Radar is the geo-location dev tool

- Our main languages are Rust and TypeScript, we also use mobile and offline pipeline languages (Python, Scala, and Terraform).

- We're based in NYC with our HQ in Union Square and remote friendly (US)

- HorizonDB, our Geospatial database written in Rust

- Precise indoor location more accurate than iOS and Android leveraging Ultra-Wideband, other mobile sensors and ML.

- Extracting raw map data from satellite maps and the web leveraging ML and AI

- Anomaly detection to identify spoofed locations

- Mobile infrastructure that automatically configures itself optimizing battery-life and location accuracy for different use-cases over time

- Multi-Region AWS K8s deployment, 99.99%+ availability

- Frontend tools to visualize and debug location data at scale

我们构建了一个人工智能系统，为复杂的建筑和基础设施大型项目构建软件，以销售目前仅由服务提供商销售的产品。为此，我们会尽一切努力来解决复杂项目的需求，并构建使我们自己自动化的系统。我们刚刚筹集了种子轮资金（估值 2500 万美元），目前有 4 名员工，预计今年总共招聘 6-10 名员工。

== 平台工程师 建立一个取代我们工作的系统。整个堆栈的算法、基础设施、共享组件、代理和内部工具。我们的平台工程师构建了从自定义会议集成到人工智能编码代理工具、沙箱环境、复杂的共享应用程序功能等的一切。

== 客户交付主管/前沿部署工程师 帮助构建运行大型项目的人工智能系统。我们正在寻找一位以客户为中心的多面手，能够理解复杂的问题并提供解决方案 - 部分产品设计师，部分交付主管，部分人工智能管理员。在这个角色中，您与客户一起部署，构建解决他们问题的软件，并尽一切努力最大限度地了解他们运行复杂项目的方式。

两个职位发布均位于 https://planlab.ai/jobs

Roles: Forward Deployed Engineer (aka Customer Delivery Lead) and Platform Engineer Both roles full-time ONSITE in London, £100–160k + 0.5–1.0% equity grant, visa sponsorship available.

We build an AI system that builds software for complex construction & infrastructure megaprojects to sell things currently only sold by service providers. To do this, we both do whatever it takes to solve complex projects' needs AND build the system that automates ourselves out of it. We just raised our seed round (25m$ valuation) and currently have 4 people, looking to hire 6-10 total this year.

== Platform Engineer Build the system that takes our jobs. Algorithms, infrastructure, shared components, agents, and internal tooling - across the full stack. Our platform engineers build everything from our custom meeting integration to AI coding agent harnesses, sandbox environments, complex shared app features and more.

== Customer Delivery Lead / Forward Deployed Engineer Help build the AI systems that run megaprojects. We’re looking for a customer-obsessed generalist who can understand complex problems and ship solutions - part product designer, part delivery lead, part AI wrangler. In this role you deploy with customers, build software that solves their problems and do whatever it takes to maximally learn about the way they run their complex projects.

Both job postings live at https://planlab.ai/jobs

我们正在构建一个人工智能原生平台，将物理模拟从长达数天的工作转变为毫秒推理。思考：在 CFD、FEA、热数据和大型物理模型 (LPM) 前沿研究方面培训深度学习代理，以便工程师可以在一次会议中探索数千种设计变体 - 涉及航空航天、半导体、能源和汽车。

You should have the scar tissue of running agents in production and strong opinions on what the future looks like.

We're ~170 people, raised $135M Series B, and backed by General Catalyst, Atomico, Siemens, and Applied Materials. The team includes people from F1, SpaceX, Google, Palantir, and Tesla.

- 务实的法学硕士反思： https://maxemitchell.com/writings/i-read-all-of-cloudflares-...

- 低级计算： https://gab-menezes.github.io/2025/01/13/using-the-most-unhi...

- 开源人工智能研究： https://www.krea.ai/blog/flux-krea-open-source-release

目前项目：

- 用于基于节点的工具的 WebGL2/WebGPU 和用于协作的 CRDT

- 大规模多模态模型训练

- 跨服务指标、跟踪和可观察性

- LLM驱动的JS捆绑优化

---

请通过 `ssh apply@krea.engineering` 申请

您还可以通过以下方式申请 https://krea.ai/careers 但这并不好玩。

Krea; Fulltime; Onsite, San Francisco, CA, USA.

I'm the cofounder of Krea (https://www.krea.ai/), a company building creative tooling and large-scale infrastructure for multimedia teams. Users range from hobbyists to world-renowned creatives: architects behind the World Trade Center or creative teams at Apple.

We treat research, engineering, and creativity as first-class citizens. We're looking for engineers to join our research, product, and infra teams.

What we value (staff & company writings):

- AGI: https://www.matthewnewton.com/blog/arc-challenge-diffusion

- Diffusion research: https://re-n-y.github.io/devlog/rambling/steering/

- Pragmatic LLM reflections: https://maxemitchell.com/writings/i-read-all-of-cloudflares-...

- Low-level computing: https://gab-menezes.github.io/2025/01/13/using-the-most-unhi...

- Open-sourcing AI research: https://www.krea.ai/blog/flux-krea-open-source-release

Current projects:

- WebGL2/WebGPU for node-based tools & CRDTs for collaboration

- Large-scale multimodal model training

- Cross-service metrics, tracing, and observability

- LLM-driven JS bundle optimization

---

Please apply via `ssh apply@krea.engineering`

You can also apply via https://krea.ai/careers but that's no fun.

klinquist 2026/04/02 05:08
韦尔卡达 |前端工程师 | ONSITE 全职 圣马特奥 CA

我是 Kris，Verkada 的访问控制经理。

访问控制是 Verkada 的核心产品。我们构建的系统可帮助客户保护和管理其办公室、学校和校园。我们的软件每天解锁近 800 万扇门。这些是关键任务系统，而不是内部工具，可靠性和可用性非常重要。

我的前端团队构建的不仅仅是小部件或表单。我们设计并提供整个工作流程，使复杂的系统变得清晰 - 管理门、组、时间表、用户 - 所有这些都在一个统一、优雅的界面中进行。这意味着与世界一流的设计师密切合作（并在需要时与他们进行辩论），但在设计资源稀缺时也具有领导的愿景和技术深度。

我正在寻找一位能够在工艺和领导力之间架起桥梁的 React 专家： - 在前端团队中进行技术领导，设定模式并指导其他人。 - 与我们的网络基础设施和组件库团队深入合作，塑造我们平台的构建模块。 - 冠军用户体验 - 因为在全球范围内构建安全、直观的体验不仅需要掌握 React/Redux，还需要设计同理心。

这是一个工程师团队，他们想要真正的所有权、可见的影响和植根于生产现实的问题。 Verkada 处于首次公开募股前，估值为 5.8B 美元，整个工程组织约有 350 人，这保持了较高的范围和团队相对自治。

职位描述： https://job-boards.greenhouse.io/verkada/jobs/5070042007

给我发电子邮件：kris.linquist at verkada.com

Verkada | Frontend Engineer | ONSITE Full-Time San Mateo CA

I'm Kris, a manager on Access Control at Verkada.

Access Control is a core product at Verkada. We build the systems that power how customers secure and manage their offices, schools, and campuses. Our software unlocks nearly 8 million doors every day. These are mission-critical systems, not internal tools, and reliability and usability matter a lot.

My frontend team builds more than small widgets or forms. We design and deliver entire workflows that bring clarity to complex systems - managing doors, groups, schedules, users - all within a unified, elegant interface. This means working closely with world-class designers (and debating them when needed), but also having the vision and technical depth to lead when design resources are scarce.

I'm looking for a React expert who can bridge craft and leadership: - Lead technically within the frontend team, setting patterns and guiding others. - Collaborate deeply with our web infrastructure and component library teams to shape the building blocks of our platform. - Champion UX - because building secure, intuitive experiences at global scale is as much about design empathy as it is about React/Redux mastery.

This is a team for engineers who want real ownership, visible impact, and problems rooted in production reality. Verkada is pre-IPO with a $5.8B valuation, and the entire engineering org is about 350 people, which keeps scope high and teams relatively autonomous.

Job description: https://job-boards.greenhouse.io/verkada/jobs/5070042007

Email me: kris.linquist at verkada.com

我们是一家由风险投资资助的初创公司（最近筹集了 5100 万美元的 C 轮融资），为基础设施即代码（从 OpenTofu、Terraform、Terragrunt、CloudFormation、Pulumi、Kubernetes 到 Ansible）构建基础设施编排器和协作管理平台。

在后端，我们使用 100% Go 和 AWS 原语。我们正在寻找有时喜欢做 DevOps 工作的后端开发人员（因为在某种程度上这是我们公司的精神），或者具有云原生生态系统经验。理想情况下，您应该有使用 IaC 工具的经验，例如 Terraform、Pulumi、Ansible、CloudFormation、Kubernetes 或 SaltStack。

总的来说，我们有一个技术含量很高的产品，试图打造出客户喜欢使用的东西，并拥有很多快乐和满意的客户。我们承诺有趣的工作、开源项目中不给我们带来业务优势的部分的能力，以及健康的工作时间。

Spacelift | Remote (Europe) | Full-time | Senior Software Engineer | $80k-$110k+ (can go higher)

We're a VC-funded startup (recently raised $51M Series C) building an infrastructure orchestrator and collaborative management platform for Infrastructure-as-Code – from OpenTofu, Terraform, Terragrunt, CloudFormation, Pulumi, Kubernetes, to Ansible.

On the backend we're using 100% Go with AWS primitives. We're looking for backend developers who like doing DevOps'y stuff sometimes (because in a way it's the spirit of our company), or have experience with the cloud native ecosystem. Ideally you'd have experience working with an IaC tool, i.e. Terraform, Pulumi, Ansible, CloudFormation, Kubernetes, or SaltStack.

Overall we have a deeply technical product, trying to build something customers love to use, and have a lot of happy and satisfied customers. We promise interesting work, the ability to open source parts of the project which don't give us a business advantage, as well as healthy working hours.

If that sounds like fun to you, please apply at https://careers.spacelift.io/jobs/3006934-software-engineer-...

WireScreen 是一家快速发展的红杉资本 A 轮融资初创公司，致力于构建首选开源情报平台，以应对全球供应链和中国相关风险。虽然中国保留着一些世界上最详细的企业所有权记录，但真正的挑战是将这些点连接起来。这就是我们的切入点——揭示公司背后的网络、关系和财务联系，以支持国家安全、合规性和监管监督。

我们正在寻找一名高级产品经理加入我们，担任早期产品角色，这代表着一个定义 WireScreen 旗舰产品未来的机会。您将成为直接与公司领导层合作的小团队的一员，完全拥有全新产品，并对全球企业透明度的未来产生有意义的影响。

WireScreen (Series A) | Senior Product Manager | NYC - hybrid | Full-time | $175k-$215k base + equity | https://jobs.ashbyhq.com/wirescreen/3c97417f-45f1-4480-8d38-...

WireScreen is a fast-growing Sequoia-backed Series A startup building the go-to open source intelligence platform for navigating global supply chains and China-related risk. While China maintains some of the world’s most detailed corporate ownership records, the real challenge is connecting the dots. That’s where we come in—surfacing the networks, relationships, and financial ties behind companies to support national security, compliance, and regulatory oversight.

We’re looking for a Senior Product Manager to join us in an early stage product role that represents an opportunity to define the future of WireScreen’s flagship product. You’ll be part of a small team working directly with company leadership, take full ownership of brand new products, and have a meaningful impact on the future of corporate transparency around the globe.

If you have prior startup experience, have worked on at least one data product (or have strong data chops), and bring 6+ years of PM experience - we’d love to talk to you.

Apply here: https://jobs.ashbyhq.com/wirescreen/3c97417f-45f1-4480-8d38-...

Or you can reach out to me directly with questions or your resume at leo.green@wirescreen.ai - I lead recruiting here at WireScreen, but if I don't know the answer I'll ping our engineering folks and come back to you fast. If you think this role isn’t at the right level for you but are interested in working here, let me know!

啊哈！是产品经理规划战略和路线图的第一工具。我们为全球超过 700,000 名用户提供服务。我们正在寻找：

Aha! (https://www.aha.io) | Rails / React / Devops | REMOTE

Aha! is the #1 tool for product managers to plan strategy and roadmaps. We serve more than 700,000 users worldwide. We are looking for:

* Experienced full-stack Rails and security engineers to work on the Aha! product. Our application is built in Ruby on Rails, with React on the frontend for rich client-side experiences.

* Devops engineers with Ruby experience. We focus on the "dev" and all of our operations driven by code.

Aha! is profitable, you can work from anywhere in North or South America, and we offer excellent benefits. We use our own product to manage our work (which is especially rewarding) and we deploy continuously.

Our entire team has always been 100% remote - in North American timezones so we can collaborate during the work day.

在 HN 中查看
FireBeyond 2026/04/02 07:37
在产品领域......我知道这是一个卖方市场，但令人沮丧的是看到工作申请（在 Aha 的案例中）“写了 14 段 x、y 和 z 的详细和具体的细分” 前 我们甚至会决定是否与您交谈”。

我们都想摆脱人工智能垃圾等，但在被“申请这份工作花了一个小时或更长时间，除了收到蟋蟀确认收据之外什么都得不到”而被烧伤太多次之后，我看到了这一点，然后我转身离开。

In the product space... I get that this is a seller's market, but it's frustrating to see job applications that have (in Aha's) case "write 14 paragraphs of detailed and specific breakdowns of x and y and z before we'll even decide if we'll speak to you".

We all want to get away from AI slop, etc., but after having been burned one too many times by "perform an hour or more of work in applying for this job to not even get anything more than acknowledgment of receipt followed by crickets", I see that, and I turn away.

Role: Build and operate distributed database systems and data platform services that store all of the data for Discord's 200M+ users.

We're solving interesting problems around performance, reliability, and scalability at one of the largest communication platforms. Looking for strong infrastructure and distributed systems experience, familiarity with databases like Cassandra/ScyllaDB/Postgres, and comfort working in Rust or similar systems languages.

我们正在招聘量化开发人员——一个由工程师和研究人员组成的通才团队，他们拥有整个业务的研究渠道和软件基础设施。 Stack 是 Rust、Python 和 C++。我们需要的是敏锐、协作、不自负的人才。

Quadrature | Quant Dev | London, New York, Singapore | Full-Time | Onsite

We’re Quadrature, a technology company in the algo trading space. We use advanced machine learning on large amounts of data to predict trends in financial markets. More at https://quadrature.ai.

What makes us different:

- ~250 people, no traders — our systems trade autonomously.

- Single PnL.

- We don’t separate “quant researchers” from “developers” — everyone codes to a high level and has the opportunity to do research.

- Mission-driven: our climate foundation (https://www.qc.foundation/) has made significant divestment commitments over recent years. For many of us, it's why we're here.

We’re hiring Quant Developers — a generalist team of engineers and researchers who own both the research pipeline and software infrastructure across the entire business. Stack is Rust, Python and C++. We want sharp, collaborative people with no big egos.

QUOBYTE |加利福尼亚州圣克拉拉和德国柏林 |全职/远程|现场 | https://www.quobyte.com/

在 库字节 我们正在开发一个围绕并行文件系统核心构建的高度可扩展和容错的软件存储系统。我们的客户将我们用于企业和研究中的大规模 AI 和 HPC 集群、k8s 和 OpenStack 基础设施，以及作为 SaaS 产品的可扩展后端。 Quobyte 集群跨越数万台机器，速度高达 100 GB/s！

在幕后，我们构建了一个全栈容错并行文件系统，涵盖从我们自己的复制数据库系统设计的内核开发到分布式算法（Paxos！）和性能的一切。简而言之：许多现实世界中具有挑战性和有趣的问题！

我们是一个高效的工程团队，经常发货，进行代码审查，并进行大量的单元和集成测试。如果您对系统充满热情，我们可能是您的正确选择！

德国柏林：

* 基础设施/支持工程师（40-80k 欧元）

如需详细职位描述和申请流程，请访问 https://www.quobyte.com/company/careers 或者写信去 quobyte.com 工作。

Hacker News Post - Who is hiring?

QUOBYTE | Santa Clara, CA and Berlin, Germany | Full-time / Remote | ONSITE | https://www.quobyte.com/

At Quobyte we are working on a highly scalable and fault-tolerant software storage system built around a parallel file system core. Our customers use us for large scale AI and HPC clusters in the enterprise and research, k8s and OpenStack infrastructures, and as a scalable backend for SaaS products. There are Quobyte clusters which span tens of thousands of machines and slurp 100s of GB/s!

Under the hood, we have built a full-stack fault-tolerant parallel file system, with everything from kernel development over our own replicated database system design to distributed algorithms (Paxos!) and performance. In short: lots of real-world challenging and fun problems!

We work as a highly efficient engineering team, ship frequently, do code reviews, and have lots of unit and integration testing. If you’re passionate about systems, we might be the right place for you!

Berlin, Germany:

* Infrastructure/Support Engineer (40-80k EUR)

For detailed job descriptions please and application process, please visit https://www.quobyte.com/company/careers or write to work at quobyte.com.

通过将法律代码转化为人工智能代码，Norm 使企业能够以可靠性和信任的方式更快、更全面地开展法律和合规流程。 Norm Ai 是领先的法律与合规人工智能公司，拥有管理资产总计 30 万亿美元的客户群。

Norm 的平台结合了前沿人工智能、专有法律推理系统以及嵌入式法律和监管专业知识。

我们最近筹集了超过 1.4 亿美元，由 Blackstone、Bain Capital、Vanguard、花旗、纽约人寿、TIAA、Coatue、Craft Ventures、Henry R. Kravis（KKR 联合创始人）和 Marc Benioff（Salesforce 首席执行官）支持。

Norm Ai 开创了法律工程，该过程使律师能够使用 Norm 专有的无代码软件工具套件构建和监督特定领域的人工智能代理。我们从美国顶级律师事务所聘请了数十名律师，并将他们培训为法律工程师，专门研究大型语言模型驱动的法律工作流程。

Norm Ai 技术已部署在世界上许多最大、最有影响力的机构内。该公司正在快速发展，并在纽约招聘所有团队，包括：

- 工程经理（235k-280k 美元）

- 前沿部署工程师（145k-250k 美元）

By turning legal code into AI code, Norm enables enterprises to move faster and more comprehensively in their legal and compliance processes with reliability and trust. Norm Ai, the leading Legal & Compliance AI company, has a client base with a combined $30 trillion in assets under management.

Norm’s platform combines frontier AI, proprietary legal reasoning systems, and embedded legal and regulatory expertise.

We have recently raised more than $140 million, backed by Blackstone, Bain Capital, Vanguard, Citi, New York Life, TIAA, Coatue, Craft Ventures, Henry R. Kravis (KKR co-founder), and Marc Benioff (Salesforce CEO).

Norm Ai pioneered Legal Engineering, the process that empowers lawyers to build and supervise domain-specific AI agents with Norm’s proprietary suite of no-code software tools. We hired dozens of lawyers from premier U.S. law firms and trained them as Legal Engineers, who specialize in Large Language Model powered legal workflows.

Norm Ai technology is deployed inside many of the largest and most consequential institutions in the world. The company is growing quickly and hiring in NYC across all teams, including:

- Full Stack Engineer, Senior + Staff ($190k-280k)

- Engineering Manager ($235k-280k)

- Applied AI Engineer ($220k-285k)

- Forward Deployed Engineer ($145k-250k)

We're also hiring for many non-technical roles. These roles are hybrid/in-person in NYC. The best way to apply is online on our website (we review every application!). Full list here: https://jobs.ashbyhq.com/norm-ai?utm_source=7ow8wN5o3g.

Stellar | Amsterdam, the Netherlands | Onsite (2 days remote OK) | €70-100k + equity | https://stellarcs.ai

Hey, I'm one of Stellar's founders. We're building AI for large contact centers, our primary product is voice.

Everyone thinks contact centers are boring. They're wrong. It's the last place where companies actually talk to their customers. We listen to calls every week and it's fascinating. AI here helps real people: shorter wait times, 24/7 support, lower cost. We’ve helped companies go from 60 to 98% pickup rate in weeks.

We're bootstrapped, 10 FTE, cash-flow positive, and growing fast with household names in the Netherlands and Belgium. Doubling our volume every month for the last 4 months.

We’re all builders. Everybody in our company still writes code. We have 2 roles open:

1. We need product minded engineers who can jump between our Go and TS backends and React frontend.

2. We need implementation leads that love working with clients. FDEs welcome as well.

This role is perfect if you:

* Want massive ownership at a small team

* Actually enjoy solving hard problems (real-time audio at enterprise scale)

* Think making AI sound human in niche dialects is a fun challenge

Find the full vacancies here: https://www.stellarcs.ai/careers

EU work authorization is required. No visa sponsorship available.

Apply: e-mail is in my profile, please indicate HN in your e-mail.

申请：查看角色 https://www.nuancelabs.ai/careers 并提及“hackernews”以了解您是如何听说我们的。

Nuance Labs | Multiple Engineering Roles | Seattle, WA | ONSITE | https://www.nuancelabs.ai

Nuance Labs is building the first "human foundation model" — a unified system that understands and expresses human emotion in real-time across speech, facial expression, and body language. We are crossing the "uncanny valley" to create AI interactions that feel truly alive.

We recently raised a $10M seed round (Accel, South Park Commons, Lightspeed) and our founding team comes from MIT, UW, and Oxford, with deep experience shipping AI products at Apple and Meta. We are a small, fast-moving team that values in-person collaboration in our Seattle HQ.

We are looking for:

Machine Learning Infra Engineer: Own our GPU-backed serving stack, Kubernetes clusters, and media serving layer.

Systems Engineer (Real-Time Engine): Build our core server-side runtime. High-concurrency, low-latency systems. Python/Asyncio today, transitioning to Rust.

Why join?

Massive ownership in a high-bar, research-heavy environment.

Work on the frontier of multimodal generative AI and real-time graphics.

Competitive equity and the chance to shape a company from the ground up.

Apply: Check out the roles at https://www.nuancelabs.ai/careers and mention "hackernews" for how you heard about us.

Pango 正在构建世界上第一个电子商务物流代理操作系统。我们的愿景是打造未来的人工智能电商员工。我们正在斯德哥尔摩组建核心团队，并正在寻找优秀的工程师。我们已经实现了产品与市场的契合，并且正在快速增长。

如果满足以下条件，您就很适合：

* 您能够轻松地维护、扩展和运营 B2B SaaS 平台的大部分内容，并具有高度的主人翁意识。

* 您乐于承担大公司中划分为多个角色的工作，并以出色的水平执行。

* 你不惧怕任何技术。如果我们需要一款桌面应用程序，而您以前没有做过，您将学习 Electron.js 的文档并构建一个。如果需要一个预测交付时间的模型，您将进行文献综述以找到合适的架构并训练一个模型。

* 您对任何后端语言或平台有很强的熟练程度，并且有强烈的意愿深入研究 PHP/Laravel 或对 JS/React 有很强的熟练程度。

* 有电子商务（Shopify、Magento、其他平台、运输公司集成）经验者优先。

* 如果您用自己的话撰写最初的电子邮件（无论多么简短），则会加分。

您将在塑造产品和公司方面发挥关键作用，产生影响和推动职业发展的能力仅受您的才能和兴趣的限制。

如果您感兴趣或有任何疑问，请联系 lukasz@pango.ai。我们立即审查申请并迅速采取行动。

Pango | Senior Software Engineer - Full Stack, Technical Lead / Software Engineer | On-site (hybrid) in Stockholm, Sweden (Visa Sponsorship possible) | Full time

Pango is building the world's first Agentic Operating System for e-commerce logistics. Our vision is to create the AI e-commerce employee of the future. We are forming our core team in Stockholm and are looking for exceptional engineers. We have achieved a product-market fit and are growing rapidly.

You are a good fit if:

* You are comfortable maintaining, expanding and operating a substantial chunk of a B2B SaaS platform with a high sense of ownership.

* You are happy to take on work that in a large company is divided into multiple roles, and execute it all at an excellent level.

* You are unafraid of any technology. If we need a desktop app and you haven't done one before, you will study the documentation of Electron.js and build one. If a model for predicting delivery times is needed, you will do a literature review to find the right architecture and train one.

* You have strong proficiency in any backend language or platform, with a strong willingness to dive deep into PHP/Laravel OR strong proficiency in JS/React.

* E-commerce (Shopify, Magento, other platforms, shipping carrier integrations) experience is a plus.

* Extra points if you write the initial email - however short - using your own words.

You will take a key role in shaping the product and company, with ability to make an impact and advance career limited only by your aptitude and interest.

Reach out to lukasz@pango.ai if you are interested or have any questions. We review applications immediately and move quickly.

jbobron 2026/04/02 01:24
游戏大脑人工智能（https://www.gamebrain.com/) |计算机视觉架构师（BEV 和空间感知）|远程 + 密歇根州特洛伊（每季度 1-2 周付费旅行）|全日制

我是 GameBrain 的首席技术官。我之前花了 6 年时间帮助 Cruise 和 Ford 构建自动驾驶汽车感知堆栈。

在 Gamebrain，我们应用 SOTA 计算机视觉模型来帮助团队显着加快比赛准备和侦察速度，每周节省数天的手动重复工作，从而使教练和分析师对对手具有巨大的影响力。最大的解锁之一：通过体育行业的深厚关系合法获取真实、高质量的体育数据。任何构建过生产型 CV 系统的人都知道这是多么罕见和多么有价值。

我正在招聘一名深度学习计算机视觉工程师。如果您的职业生涯一直在设计、培训和扩展复杂的感知堆栈（在 AV、机器人、AR/VR 或任何需要严格的 3D 空间推理和多视图融合的领域），那么这个角色就是为您量身打造的。

工程问题：具有未知相机内在/外在的自动单应性、通过严重遮挡的时间跟踪以及多视图传感器融合。

我们不想要一个 50 人的工程组织。我们需要一支高度精英和专业的团队来超越庞大的遗留组织。

您将拥有我们感知管道的零到一架构。我们刚刚从自动驾驶汽车领域聘请了一位主动学习专家，您将与他密切合作。

您必须深入了解射影几何、表示学习与像素重建，以及如何构建强大的主动学习循环。

我们为这一角色提供与一级自动驾驶公司（特斯拉、Waymo）同等的报酬。

地点：任何地方。要求每季度来特洛伊 1-2 周（我们将支付费用）。需要在东部时间期间需要时参加会议。

如果您是一位高杠杆运营商，想要构建复杂的空间架构，并在第一天就实际看到生产，请申请以下内容：

https://www.linkedin.com/jobs/view/4393019529/

GameBrain AI (https://www.gamebrain.com/) | Staff Computer Vision Architect (BEV & Spatial Perception) | Remote + Troy, MI (1-2 week paid travel per quarter) | Full-time

I’m the CTO at GameBrain. I previously spent 6 years helping to build autonomous vehicle perception stacks at Cruise and Ford.

At Gamebrain, we’re applying SOTA computer vision models to help teams dramatically accelerate game prep and scouting, saving days of manual repetitive work per week to give coaches and analysts massive leverage over their opponents. One of the biggest unlocks: legal access to real, high-quality sports data through deep relationships in the sports industry. Anyone who has built production CV systems knows how rare, and how valuable, that is.

I'm hiring a Staff Deep Learning Computer Vision Engineer. If you've spent your career designing, training, and scaling complex perception stacks - in AV, robotics, AR/VR, or anywhere that demands rigorous 3D spatial reasoning and multi-view fusion - this role was made for you.

The engineering problems: automated homography with unknown camera intrinsics/extrinsics, temporal tracking through heavy occlusion, and multi-view sensor fusion.

We do not want a 50-person engineering org. We want a highly elite and specialized team to outperform massive legacy organizations.

You will own the zero-to-one architecture of our perception pipeline. We just hired an Active learning expert from the self driving car space who you will work closely with.

You must deeply understand projective geometry, representation learning vs. pixel reconstruction, and how to build robust active learning loops.

We compensate at parity with tier-one AV companies (Tesla, Waymo) for this role.

Location: Anywhere. Required to come to Troy 1-2 weeks per quarter (which we will pay for). Required to take meetings when needed during Eastern Time hours.

If you are a high-leverage operator who wants to build complex spatial architecture that actually sees production on day one, apply below:

https://www.linkedin.com/jobs/view/4393019529/

发光 |软件工程师|加利福尼亚州洛杉矶现场 |全职

Luminate 是娱乐行业卓越的数据和洞察合作伙伴，是唱片公司、电影制片厂、艺人经纪公司以及音乐和娱乐生态系统各个部分的单一事实来源。

该团队的堆栈是 Java w/ Spring、React w/ Typescript、SQL w/postgres 和 Snowflake。我们使用 playwright 进行 e2e 测试并在 AWS 上部署我们的基础设施。

该团队相对较新（大约 3 年），但正在开发具有大量技术债务的旧代码库。幸运的是，我们实际上_确实_有时间来解决我们的技术债务，并花时间让我们的代码比我们发现的更好，所以它一直在变得更好。

我们有轮值值班人员，但被传呼的情况很少见。

在这里申请： https://luminatedata.com/careers/?gh_jid=4677478005

请在求职信中提及黑客新闻。

Luminate | Software Engineer | Onsite Los Angeles, CA | Full Time

Luminate is the entertainment industry’s preeminent data and insights partner, serving as the single source of truth for record labels, film studios, talent agencies, and every part of the music and entertainment ecosystem.

The team's stack is Java w/ Spring, React w/ Typescript, and SQL w/postgres, and snowflake. We use playwright for e2e testing and deploy our infra on AWS.

The team is relatively new (around 3 years old) but is working on an older codebase with plenty of tech debt. Luckily we actually _do_ get time to address our tech debt and take the time to leave our code better than we found it, so it's getting better all the time.

We have an oncall rotation but getting paged is pretty rare.

Apply here: https://luminatedata.com/careers/?gh_jid=4677478005

Please mention Hacker News in your cover letter.

mooreds 2026/04/02 01:32
融合认证|高级 Java 工程师、客户主管、解决方案工程师 | REMOTE（在美国，也在欧洲，但仅适用于客户执行/解决方案工程师职位）和美国科罗拉多州丹佛市的 ONSITE 之间有所不同，每个职位描述中有详细信息 |职位要求中列出了薪资范围，但高级 Java 工程师的薪资范围为 140k-180k

在 FusionAuth，我们的使命是为每个构建 Web 和移动应用程序的开发人员提供简单、安全的身份验证和授权。我们希望开发人员不再担心身份验证，而是专注于构建一些很棒的东西。

身份验证领域有很多公司，但我们觉得我们有一些特别的东西：

* 相对独特的部署模型（本地自托管、在您的云中运行或让我们为您操作）

* 精心设计的 API 第一种方法；一位客户将我们的 API 与 petrichor 进行了比较

* 一个成熟的产品（代码库已经有九年多的历史了，我们已经发现并修复了围绕核心登录用例的许多尖锐边缘；但不用担心，还有更多功能需要添加）

* 我们的CTO是创始人，仍然写代码

* 全功能的免费啤酒版本，使销售周期更容易；潜在客户通常已经完成了集成原型

我们的核心软件是商业软件。我们开源了许多支持基础设施。您将使用的技术和标准：现代 Java、PostgreSQL、Docker、Kubernetes、MySQL、OAuth、SAML、OIDC。

了解更多信息，包括福利和薪水，并在此处申请： https://fusionauth.io/careers/ （点击/点击“查看未平仓头寸”橙色按钮。）

FusionAuth | Senior Java Engineer, Account Executive , Solutions Engineer | Varies between REMOTE (in USA, also in Europe but only for the account exec/solutions engineer positions) and ONSITE in Denver, CO, USA, details in each job desc | Salary ranges listed on job req, but for the Senior Java Engineer it is 140k-180k

At FusionAuth, our mission is to make authentication and authorization simple and secure for every developer building web and mobile applications. We want devs to stop worrying about auth and focus on building something awesome.

There are a lot of companies in the auth space, but we feel like we have something special:

* a relatively unique deployment model (self-host on-prem, run in your cloud or let us operate it for you)

* A well designed API first approach; one customer compared our APIs to petrichor

* a mature product (the code base is nine+ years old and we've found and fixed a lot of the sharp edges around core login use cases; but don't worry, there are plenty more features to add)

* our CTO is the founder and still writes code

* a full featured free-as-in-beer version which makes the sales cycle easier; prospects often come in having prototyped an integration already

Our core software is commercial. We open source much of our supporting infrastructure. Technologies and standards that you will work with: modern Java, PostgreSQL, Docker, Kubernetes, MySQL, OAuth, SAML, OIDC.

Learn more, including benefits and salaries, and apply here: https://fusionauth.io/careers/ ( Click/tap the 'View open positions' orange button. )

在 Tandem Health，我们正在打造一名临床医生副驾驶，让临床医生能够专注于护理而不是管理。我们正在快速构建、启动和迭代，并且已经在欧洲一些最大的护理链中推广，包括大多数 NHS。

Tandem Health | Software Engineers | On-site in Stockholm, Sweden | Full time

At Tandem Health we're building a clinician copilot to allow clinicians to focus on care rather than administration. We’re building, launching and iterating quickly, and are already rolling out across some of the largest care chains across Europe, including most of the NHS.

Our first product listens in to the patient-clinician encounter to generate medical records, allowing clinicians to save 5-10 minutes per patient. No longer do clinicians have to catch up on administration after hours.

We’re expanding our Stockholm team with exceptional builders in a wide range of roles.

PrairieLearn (Remote US) — Full-Stack Software Engineer — TypeScript / Postgres / React / AI

PrairieLearn (https://www.prairielearn.com) is an open-source assessment platform used by universities across the US (Berkeley, Princeton, Michigan, Illinois, and others). We power mastery-based learning and large-scale exams.

We’re a small, profitable, early-stage company (bootstrapped, no VC) that is growing quickly. Our users love us and we have very high retention and rapid spread through word of mouth. As an early-stage hire, you’ll work across the stack and enjoy meaningful ownership from day one.

Tech we use: Node.js / TypeScript backend, Postgres, AWS, React. We’re also developing AI tooling, including LLM agents to help instructors create content, and vision-language models to help grade student work. PrairieLearn is open core: https://github.com/PrairieLearn/PrairieLearn

Details:

- Location: Remote (US only)

- Salary: $100k-$140k depending on experience

- Benefits: Stock options (0.5% - 1.5%), unlimited PTO, flexible hours

- Role: Full-time. (We’re not able to sponsor visas at this time.)

寻找经验丰富的工程师为柏林资产管理基金构建和扩展基础设施和数据平台。我们在人工智能上下了很大的赌注，以提高投资回报并建立最好的基础设施来支持我们的高阿尔法目标（自成立以来每年的业绩记录>30%； https://bitcap.com/en/bit-global-technology-opportunities-ai...）。

您将设计大规模数据管道，发展我们的 Lakehouse 架构，增强数据质量和可观测性，并为 AI/LLM 工作流程构建基础设施（代理脚手架、RAG、LLMOps、工程 AI）。我们正在寻找一位实际操作的技术领导者，他可以端到端地指导计划，同时深入实施。

我们植根于科技创业（Jan Beckers），即使作为一家受监管的金融机构，这种心态仍然主导着我们的工作文化。我们是一个由约 40 人组成的团队，具有扁平化的层级结构、亲力亲为的领导力、快节奏的决策以及一点书呆子文化，因为人们实际上对自己的工作充满热情。堆栈：AWS、Databricks/Spark、Python、PostgreSQL、Agentic AI。

BIT Capital | Principal Engineer (Data & Platform) | Berlin, Germany | ONSITE (2 days/week) | Full-time

Looking for experienced engineers to build and scale infrastructure and data platforms for a Berlin asset management fund. We are betting big on AI to drive investment returns and build the best infrastructure to support our high alpha targets (track record >30% p.a. since inception; https://bitcap.com/en/bit-global-technology-opportunities-ai...).

You'll design large-scale data pipelines, evolve our lakehouse architecture, strengthen data quality and observability, and build infrastructure for AI/LLM workflows (agentic scaffolding, RAG, LLMOps, AI for engineering). We are looking for a hands-on technical leader, that is steering initiatives end-to-end while staying deep in implementation.

We have our roots in tech entrepreneurship (Jan Beckers), and this mindset still dominates our work culture, even as a regulated financial institution. We are a team of ~40 with a flat hierarchy, hands-on leadership, fast-paced decisions, and a little nerdy culture as people are actually passionate about their work. Stack: AWS, Databricks/Spark, Python, PostgreSQL, Agentic AI.

If the complexity of financial markets excites you as much as the complexity of distributed systems, you'll love it here. Competitive comp, relocation & visa support, stellar team.

阿尔特德 |首席工程师（首次聘用）|英国伦敦/剑桥 |混合动力| £60k + 早期 EMI 股权

Alterdd 正在为时尚构建合身智能层。目前，品牌缺乏关于其产品如何真正适合真实客户的结构化数据，这使其成为一个代价高昂的问题。我们正在通过帮助品牌了解其合身性来解决这个问题，以便他们能够在第一时间销售合身的衣服。

我们正在寻找第一位技术人员来完全掌控我们的工程，将我们的技术从原型转向生产。

为什么这个角色很有趣：

这是专门为渴望成为领导角色的高级工程师设计的桥梁。如果您希望能够自主地从头开始构建产品和底层系统，而无需等待指示，那么您就有机会赢得“首席”头衔。您将直接与创始人合作，想法和执行之间零层。

你将做什么和堆叠：

- 设计和构建跨前端、后端和数据层的可扩展系统。 - Stack：使用 TypeScript、React、Node、Python（或类似）的全栈应用程序。 - 数据：PostgreSQL，构建管道来摄取产品源和拟合数据。 - 集成：将我们的技术嵌入到 Shopify 等电子商务平台中。您需要设计能够处理不同品牌之间高度不一致的产品和尺码数据的系统。

工作风格及面试： 在伦敦或剑桥进行混合工作（每周 2-3 天）。面试过程很快并且尊重您的时间：一次在线技术面试，然后是一次与创始人的面对面面试。

如需申请，请联系 tech[dot]jobs[at]alterdd.com

Alterdd | Lead Engineer (First Hire) | London/Cambridge, UK | Hybrid | £60k + Early-stage EMI Equity

Alterdd is building the fit intelligence layer for fashion. Currently, brands lack structured data on how their products actually fit real customers, making it a massively costly problem. We are fixing this by helping brands understand their fit so they can sell clothes that fit correctly the first time.

We are looking for our first technical hire to take full ownership of our engineering, moving our technology from prototype to production.

Why this role is interesting:

This is specifically designed as a bridge for a hungry Senior Engineer who is ready to step up into a Lead role. If you want the autonomy to build both the product and underlying systems from the ground up without waiting for direction, this is your shot to earn that Lead title. You will work directly with the founder with zero layers between idea and execution.

What you will do & stack:

- Design and build scalable systems across frontend, backend, and data layers. - Stack: Full-stack applications using TypeScript, React, Node, Python (or similar). - Data: PostgreSQL , building pipelines to ingest product feeds and fit data. - Integrations: Embedding our tech into e-commerce platforms like Shopify. You will need to design systems that handle highly inconsistent product and sizing data across different brands.

Working style & Interview: Hybrid working (2-3 days a week in person) in London or Cambridge. The interview process is fast and respects your time: one online technical interview, followed by one in-person interview with the founder.

To apply, please reach out to tech[dot]jobs[at]alterdd.com

You'll be working on solving every aspect of the rental journey, from models to predict the right price of a property, to building the future of property management, all to help tenants find their dream home, and landlords their ideal tenant.

We're VC backed, profitable, and have plenty of ambition to maintain our fast growth in this absolutely massive market.

- Senior Full-Stack Engineer | Equity | 110k+ (based on experience) + quarterly bonus - Lead Product Designer | Equity | 110k+ (based on experience) + quarterly bonus

All roles visible here: https://www.openrent.co.uk/jobs

实验室（https://www.thelab.co) |高级后端工程师|现场（纽约）或远程（美国）|全日制

我们正在寻找两名经验丰富的后端工程师：（1）一名领导客户的电子商务业务； (2) 第二个是加入一个小团队，从事涉及 ML 和 NLP 驱动的工作流自动化工具的绿地项目。理想的候选人应该具有使用大型 Python 和 Typescript 代码库的经验。我们正在寻找能够自我激励、能够在项目早期与团队合作、计划和确定需求、监督项目直至完成并在此过程中指导团队初级成员的人。

---

关于实验室

我们是一家由创客组成的机构，在解决创意和技术挑战方面拥有深厚的专业知识。我们的重点是做出更好的工作，帮助品牌更好地运作。从品牌和设计，到软件构建、大规模电子商务或介于两者之间的任何事物，该实验室将灵感与辛勤工作相结合，以产生有意义的成果。哦，我们还举办了一场简陋的烧烤活动。

---

如需申请，请访问：

电子商务工程师： https://thelabnyc.bamboohr.com/careers/228?source=aWQ9Mjk%3D

AI工作流程自动化工程师： https://thelabnyc.bamboohr.com/careers/189?source=aWQ9Mjk%3D

thelab (https://www.thelab.co) | Senior Backend Engineer | ONSITE (NYC) or REMOTE (US) | Full-Time

We are looking for two experienced back-end engineers: (1) one to lead work with our client’s e-commerce business; (2) a second to be part of a small team working on a greenfield project involving ML and NLP driven workflow automation tools. The ideal candidate would have experience working with large Python and Typescript codebases. We are looking for someone who is self-motivated and is able to work with a team early on in a project, plan and identify requirements, see a project through to completion, and mentor junior members of the team along the way.

---

About thelab

We’re an agency of makers with deep expertise in solving creative and technology challenges. Our focus is on making better work to help brands work better. From branding & design, to software builds, large-scale ecommerce or anything in between, thelab mixes inspiration and hard work to produce results that mean business. Oh, and we host a mean barbecue too.

---

New Lantern 正在构建人工智能放射科住院医师——想想放射科医生的 Cursor。我们的应用程序集成了放射科医生全天使用的三种软件工具 [1] 以及人工智能，创建了一个平台，可以减轻放射科医生的辛劳，让他们专注于阅读图像和发现疾病。

我们是一家 A 轮初创公司，拥有约 15 名工程师（约 30 名员工），拥有产生收入的实时客户，拥有多年的发展历程，并得到 Benchmark、Anthropic 和其他伟大投资者的支持。

我们正在招聘多个工程职位。您将直接与我们的创始人/首席执行官、放射科医生员工和最终用户合作，构建放射科医生日常依赖的产品。您将拥有真正的所有权和自主权，并经常交付有意义的工作。

我是 Steve，New Lantern 的工程主管。如果您有兴趣或想了解更多信息，请发送邮件至（我的 HN 用户名）@newlantern.ai。我今年已经从 HN 聘请了一名工程师，并面试了更多工程师！

[1] 放射图像存档和查看器、医疗报告听写系统和工作管理系统

New Lantern | https://newlantern.ai | Software engineers (backend and generalist product engineers, founding security engineer) | Full time in San Francisco, CA (ONSITE)

New Lantern is building an AI radiology resident—think Cursor for radiologists. Our application integrates the three software tools radiologists use all day [1], together with AI, to create a platform that saves radiologists toil and lets them focus on reading images and finding disease.

We are a series A startup with ~15 engineers (~30 total staff), have live customers generating revenue, several years of runway, and are backed by Benchmark, Anthropic, and other great investors.

We're hiring for several engineering roles. You'll work directly with our founder/CEO, our staff radiologists, and our end users to build a product that radiologists rely on daily. You'll have real ownership and autonomy, and ship meaningful work frequently.

I'm Steve, New Lantern's Head of Engineering. If you're interested or want to learn more, shoot me a note at (my HN username)@newlantern.ai. I've already hired one engineer from HN this year and interviewed many more!

[1] a radiology image archive & viewer, a medical report dictation system, and work management system

WorkWhile | Senior & Staff Engineers (Backend, Full Stack) | San Francisco, New York, Seattle, Toronto | Hybrid | Full Time

I'm an EM at WorkWhile. We're an ML-powered labor marketplace on a mission to help 80M+ hourly workers find better-paying, more predictable work. Our platform uses demand forecasting, realtime skill based worker shift matching, dynamic pricing and many other features to solve problems in a $650B staffing industry that still runs on spreadsheets, phone calls and legacy systems.

Demand for our services is increasing and we have a lot planned. We're growing and hiring across the product engineering org at senior and staff levels:

* Senior Software Engineer, Full Stack

* Senior Software Engineer, Backend

* Staff Software Engineer, Full Stack

* Staff Software Engineer, Backend

Assembly | Founding Engineer | New York City, Onsite | Full-Time

Assembly is a vertically-integrated, technology-native holding company that acquires industrial real estate. Our intention is to build one of the largest real estate companies in the world, and to be the most technology-native real estate owner in history.

We are hiring a Founding Engineer (Full-Stack) to design and build our proprietary technology stack from inception. You will own the development of our tech stack and have significant autonomy to build. Experience with Python, React / TS, LLM APIs, data pipelines, Ruby, Ruby on Rails, web scraping and entity resolution are relevant.

Cash compensation of $250K - $350K with meaningful equity compensation as the Founding Engineer of a new business.

角色：

- 软件工程师，3D 建模

TL;DR：我们正在编写生成建筑物 3D 模型的软件。房主、承包商和保险专业人士使用这些模型来得出指标、估算成本和可视化变化（例如厨房改造）。我们的长期目标是为地球上的每座建筑提供准确且最新的 3D 模型（数字孪生）。

Hover 正在多方面扩大团队规模。 3D 建模团队特别寻找才华横溢且经验丰富的软件工程师，他们在设计和实施 3D 建模、重建或 CAD 相关软件系统方面拥有丰富的经验，并在几何和 3D 数学方面奠定了坚实的基础。作为该团队的一员，您将负责进一步增强、扩展、调整和强化我们的管道，将建筑物照片转换为 3D 模型。

如果您有兴趣与我们合作，请在线申请 https://hover.to/careers/#open-roles。提及您来自 HN，并让我们知道您最近在做什么。

Hover | https://hover.to | San Francisco, CA | ONSITE | Full-time

Roles:

- Software Engineer, 3D Modeling

- Senior Software Engineer, 3D Modeling

The TL;DR: We are writing software that generates 3D models of buildings. Homeowners, contractors, and insurance professionals use those models to derive metrics, estimate cost and visualize changes (think kitchen remodel). Our long term ambition is to have an accurate and up to date 3D model (digital twin) of every building on the planet.

Hover is expanding the team on many fronts. The 3D Modeling team in particular is looking for talented & experienced software engineers that have proven experience designing and implementing systems for 3D modeling, reconstruction, or CAD-related software and that bring a solid foundation in geometry and 3D math. As part of that team, you will be responsible for further enhancing, scaling, tuning and battle hardening our pipeline that turns photos of buildings into 3D models.

If you're interested in working with us, please apply online at https://hover.to/careers/#open-roles. Mention you're from HN and let us know what you've been working on lately.

ReadWorks is a nonprofit that provides free, research-based reading comprehension resources to 11M+ K–12 students and teachers — focused on under-resourced communities.
