在 AllSpice，我们正在构建硬件开发和协作的未来，通过设计审查、自动化测试和人工智能（想想硬件的 GitHub + copilot）将现代软件设计原理应用于硬件行业。 AllSpice 正在解锁下一代智能汽车、物联网设备、火箭、医疗设备、机器人等。

详细了解我们在 TechCrunch 上发布的最新 A 轮公告 (https://techcrunch.com/2025/06/23/allspices-platform-is-the-...）！

我们拥有一支能力强、团结协作、远程优先的团队，在马萨诸塞州萨默维尔和旧金山设有灵活的办公室。我们非常重视持续沟通和个人发展。在我们的职业页面上查看更多信息 https://allspice.io/careers

我们招聘的主要目的是：

软件总监（Go、TypeScript、Rust） - 跨越 Go、Rust 和 Vue/TypeScript 堆栈的实际领导角色（60/40% 的 IC 管理），您将拥有技术路线图，帮助制定关键架构决策，并建立塑造硬件开发未来的团队。 https://www.allspice.io/careers?ashby_jid=7b9852d3-9aaf-4344...

基础设施总监（Linux、Terraform、Docker、SOC 2）- 拥有我们的基础设施堆栈、安全态势和合规性计划，同时建立和领导一个小型、高影响力的团队。这是一个实践型领导角色（IC 的 60/40 管理），需要深厚的 AWS 和安全专业知识、与法律顾问和企业客户合作的经验，以及随着团队成长而招聘和指导的能力。 https://www.allspice.io/careers?ashby_jid=88cf1665-04ab-4043...

LLM 平台工程师（Python、Typescript）- 构建并拥有内部工具、分析平台和面向客户的应用程序，为我们的生成式 AI 团队提供支持，涵盖评估仪表板、数据管道和轻量级 Web 应用程序，以呈现 AI 驱动的设计审查见解。这一跨职能角色在我们的 LLM 堆栈（Langchain、Pydantic AI、Langfuse）中融合了 Python、TypeScript 和 SQL，让内部团队和客户能够深入了解模型性能和结果。 https://www.allspice.io/careers?ashby_jid=6d5963b2-5c5e-4dec...

增长主管 - 拥有并扩展 AllSpice 的企业需求和管道生成。 https://www.allspice.io/careers?ashby_jid=b1ac9d68-2229-4005...

技术堆栈：Docker、Terraform、GoLang、Rust、Python、Vue、Typescript、Python

请在您的申请中包含任何相关的开源项目或组合。

AllSpice | https://allspice.io/ | Boston, MA / SF Hybrid or Remote | Full time (US timezones) | Mid/Sr./Principal/Staff | Golang, Vuejs, Rust, Typescript, Python

At AllSpice, we're building the future of hardware development and collaboration, applying modern software design principles to the hardware industry with design review, automated test, and AI (think GitHub + copilot for hardware). AllSpice is unlocking the next generation of smart vehicles, IOT devices, rockets, medical devices, robotics, and much more.

Read more about our latest Series A announcement in TechCrunch (https://techcrunch.com/2025/06/23/allspices-platform-is-the-...)!

We have a highly capable, tight-knit, remote-first team with a flex office in Somerville, MA and SF. We strongly value continuous communication and personal development. See more on our careers page https://allspice.io/careers

We’re hiring primarily for:

Director of Software (Go, typescript, rust) - Hands-on leadership role (60/40% management to IC) spanning our Go, Rust, and Vue/TypeScript stack, where you'll own the technical roadmap, help make key architectural decisions, and build the team shaping the future of hardware development. https://www.allspice.io/careers?ashby_jid=7b9852d3-9aaf-4344...

Director of Infrastructure (Linux, Terraform, Docker, SOC 2) - Own our infrastructure stack, security posture, and compliance programs while building and leading a small, high-impact team. This is a hands-on leadership role (60/40 management to IC) requiring deep AWS and security expertise, experience working with legal counsel and enterprise customers, and the ability to hire and mentor as the team grows. https://www.allspice.io/careers?ashby_jid=88cf1665-04ab-4043...

LLM Platform Engineer (python, Typescript) - Build and own the internal tooling, analytics platforms, and customer-facing applications that power our Generative AI team, spanning evaluation dashboards, data pipelines, and lightweight web apps that surface AI-driven design review insights. This cross-functional role blends Python, TypeScript, and SQL across our LLM stack (Langchain, Pydantic AI, Langfuse) to give both internal teams and customers deep visibility into model performance and outcomes. https://www.allspice.io/careers?ashby_jid=6d5963b2-5c5e-4dec...

JeremyTheo 2026/04/01 23:50
德国科隆 |嗯|产品工程师|全职| 55 - 85,000 欧元 |现场（部分远程）

大家好，亚历克斯和杰里米来自 UMH。

8 年前，Jeremy 对制造业数据基础设施的现状感到非常沮丧。公司每年为“糟糕的 90 年代软件”支付数百万美元，并且今天仍在这样做，当时有更好的开源软件。所以我们决定可以做得更好，首先成立了一个系统集成商，意识到建立和维护数据基础设施的大部分任务都可以标准化，并决定创建目前由风险投资支持的 UMH，它基于开源软件构建，本身也是开源的。

我们实际构建的内容：我们构建并扩展了一个实时数据平台，该平台在单个 Docker 容器（UMH Core）内运行数百条 Benthos 管道，处理数百万条控制实际生产流程的工业消息。

再加上本地优先的用户界面（管理控制台），非技术工厂工人和高级用户/开发人员都可以在其中一起工作。是的，我们关心企业/工业软件中的用户界面。

https://jobs.umh.app/

Cologne, Germany | UMH | Product Engineer | Full-time | 55 - 85k EUR | ONSITE (part remote)

Hi, Alex and Jeremy here from UMH.

8 years ago, Jeremy was absolutely frustrated with the status quo of data infrastructure in manufacturing. Companies paid millions per year for "shitty 90s software" and are still doing that today, when there is much better software out there for open-source. So we decided that we can do this better, first founded a System Integrator, realized most of the tasks in setting up and maintaining a data infrastructure can be standardized, and decided to found the currently VC-backed UMH, which is built on open source software and is open source itself.

What we're actually building: We build and scale a real-time data platform that runs hundreds of Benthos pipelines inside a single Docker container (UMH Core), processing millions of industrial messages that control actual production processes.

Plus a local-first user interface (Management Console) where both non-technical factory workers and power-users/developers can work together. And yes, we care about UI in enterprise/industrial software.

https://jobs.umh.app/

deet 2026/04/02 03:20
基内洛| kinelo.com |产品工程（后端+AI重点）|旧金山 |现场（灵活）

我们正在招聘两名产品工程师加入我们在旧金山新开设的办公室。我们规模小、发展早，您将帮助塑造团队文化。

Kinelo 解决了“上下文近视”：自主和半自主 AI 代理不知道自己不知道什么，因此无法搜索或找到准确有效地完成任务所需的背景信息。结果看起来很糟糕，但这并不是由于模型性能，更多的是由于工作流集成。从那时起，我们正在迅速将人类和自主的“人工智能同事”组织到跨越两者的工作流程中。我们的目标是改变组织的运营和结构方式。

我们对这个职位的第一招聘标准是巨大的软件智慧，这种智慧尚未体现在法学硕士的权重中。我们并不是在寻找工匠来精心制作单行代码。我们正在寻找热衷于利用人工智能为代码生成提供的杠杆作用的软件工程师，以专注于更高阶的技术架构、产品要求和用户需求。

我们正在寻找足够的经验，以表明在交付和维护可靠、可扩展的软件方面积累的智慧、扎实的 CS 基础知识、从 0 到 1 的产品经验以及多功能性。

我们当前的技术堆栈包括 TypeScript、托管容器服务、Postgres 和 Redis。但我们具有适应能力，你也应该如此。我们高度重视软件工程和计算机科学基础知识，并且重视使用 Go、C++、Python 等其他语言的经验。

有竞争力的薪资、有意义的（~第一批员工）股权、创始人之前退出苹果、强大的筹款历史（~1000 万美元）。

请发送电子邮件至 jobs@kinelo.com。如果您想脱颖而出，请告诉我们您认为软件工程师的工作正在发生怎样的变化。这里还有一个完整的JD： https://job-boards.greenhouse.io/kinelo/jobs/4205846009

Kinelo | kinelo.com | Product Engineering (Backend+AI focus) | San Francisco | Onsite (with flexibility)

We are hiring two Product Engineers to join us in our newly opened office in SF. We're small and early and you'll help shape team culture.

Kinelo solves "context myopia": autonomous and semi-autonomous AI agents don't know what they don't know, so they can't search or find the background information required to accomplish tasks accurately and effectively. The result looks like slop but it's not due to model performance, more due to workflow integration. From there, we're rapidly moving into organizing humans together with autonomous "AI coworkers" into workflows that span both. Our goal is to change how organizations are run and structured.

Our #1 hiring criteria for this position is immense software wisdom, the kind not yet encoded in the weights of an LLM. We are not looking for artisans to meticulously craft single lines of code. We're looking for software engineers excited to use the leverage that AI offers for code production to permit focus on higher order technical architecture, product requirements, and user needs.

We're looking for enough experience that indicates accumulated wisdom in shipping and maintaining reliable, scalable software, solid CS fundamentals, experience taking products from 0 to 1, and versatility.

Our current tech stack includes TypeScript, a managed container service, Postgres, and Redis. But we are adaptive and you should be too. We highly value software engineering and computer science fundamentals and experience with other languages like Go, C++, Python is valued.

Competitive salary, meaningful (~first batch of hires) equity, founder previously exited to Apple, strong fundraising history (~$10m).

Please email us at jobs@kinelo.com. If you want to stand out, tell us how you think the job of a software engineer is changing. There's also a full JD here: https://job-boards.greenhouse.io/kinelo/jobs/4205846009

在 Shepherd，我们正在追求商业保险领域最雄心勃勃的技术愿景：完全自主的承保。 Shepherd 是一个人工智能原生商业保险平台，改变了高危行业的承保方式。

人工智能热潮背后的基础设施（数据中心、半导体工厂、可再生能源资产）必须建设并投保，但传统运营商的建设速度达不到这样的速度。我们构建 Shepherd 来解决这个问题。

我们上周刚刚宣布了 4200 万美元的 B 轮融资！这使得我们的总资金超过 6000 万美元，由全球最大保险公司之一的投资部门 Intact Private Capital 领投。 Intact 不仅是我们的主要投资者，也是运营商合作伙伴，这证明了现有行业对我们正在建设的产品充满信心。

Shepherd (Series B) | ONSITE | San Francisco, CA

At Shepherd, we're pursuing the most ambitious technical vision in commercial insurance: fully autonomous underwriting. Shepherd is an AI-native commercial insurance platform transforming how high-hazard industries get covered.

The infrastructure behind the AI boom (data centers, semiconductor fabs, renewable energy assets) has to be built and insured, but traditional carriers weren't built for this speed. We built Shepherd to solve that.

We just announced our $42M Series B last week! That brings our total funding to over $60M — led by Intact Private Capital, the investment arm of one of the largest insurers in the world. Intact is not only our lead investor but also a carrier partner, a testament to the confidence the incumbent industry has in what we're building.

(Hear from our CEO here: https://www.shepherdinsurance.com/blog/behind-our-42m-series...)

(Hear from our CTO here: https://www.shepherdinsurance.com/blog/the-road-to-autonomou...)

decodebytes 2026/04/02 06:10
始终进一步，由创建的团队创立 https://sigstore.dev ，用于保护 npm、pypi、brew，并为 github 版本、nvidia 和 google 的 AI 模型签名提供证明 - 我们现在正在构建 https://nono.sh 代理安全工具。

我们为首席软件工程师开放职位：

我们正在寻找一位首席软件工程师作为创始工程师加入。您将直接与创始人合作构建我们代理安全运行时的核心。这是一个高度自治的角色 - 您将塑造架构，与早期客户互动，并做出定义产品的权衡。

您将在代理推理和系统执行之间构建层 - 在运行之前根据安全策略拦截、分类和验证每个代理意图。 设计能够捕获并以加密方式验证每条指令和操作的系统，在容易产生幻觉和注射的环境中保持真实情况。架构细粒度、时间范围的原语，允许最低特权权限，并能够在受控、可审核的条件下升级。与研究合作，对我们的安全原语进行大规模压力测试。将新兴威胁媒介（及时注入、工具滥用、权限升级）转变为自适应防御。

https://www.alwaysfurther.ai/careers/principal-swe

员工解决方案工程师：

我们正在寻找一位解决方案工程师作为创始工程师加入，并担任我们的开源社区和不断壮大的企业设计合作伙伴基础的交汇点。您将花时间为 Nono 做出贡献，帮助塑造其架构，并直接与将其集成到概念验证和试点项目中的客户合作。这是一个实践性的角色 - 早期您将深入代码，审查拉取请求，分类问题并尝试部署架构，同时成为社区成员和企业利益相关者值得信赖的技术声音。随着时间的推移，该角色将演变为解决方案架构和面向客户的参与，因为您建立了领域专业知识和关系，使您成为设计Nono如何适应复杂企业环境的首选人员。

你将做什么” 直接为 Nono 开源项目做出贡献 - 代码、文档和架构提案。跨云环境、本地基础设施和混合设置试验 Nono 的不同部署架构，并通过我们的博客平台或 YouTube 频道与 Always Far 上的其他人以及经常与社区分享您的发现。与早期设计合作伙伴密切合作，将 Nono 集成到概念验证和试点计划中，收集反馈并将其转化为工程优先事项。制作技术内容 - 博客文章、架构指南、演示。

Always Further, founded by team who created https://sigstore.dev , used to secure npm, pypi, brew, and provide attestations for github releases, nvidia and google for AI model signing - we and are now building https://nono.sh agent security tooling.

We have roles open for a principal software engineer:

We're looking for a Principal Software Engineer to join as a founding engineer. You'll work directly with the founders to build the core of our agent security runtime. This is a high-autonomy role - you'll shape architecture, engage with early customers, and make the trade-offs that define the product.

You will build the layer between agentic reasoning and system execution — intercepting, classifying, and validating every agent intent against security policy before it runs. Design systems that capture and cryptographically verify every instruction and action, maintaining ground truth in environments prone to hallucination and injection. Architect fine-grained, time-scoped primitives that allow least-privilege permissions, with the ability to escalate under controlled, auditable conditions. Work with research to stress-test our security primitives at scale. Turn emerging threat vectors (prompt injection, tool misuse, privilege escalation) into adaptive defences.

https://www.alwaysfurther.ai/careers/principal-swe

Staff solutions engineer:

We're looking for a Solutions Engineer join as a founding engineer and to sit at the intersection of our open source community and our growing base of enterprise design partners. You'll spend your time contributing to Nono, helping shape its architecture, and working directly with customers who are integrating it into proof-of-concept and pilot programmes. This is a hands-on role - early on you'll be deep in the code, reviewing pull requests, triaging issues, and experimenting with deployment architectures, all while being a trusted technical voice for both community members and enterprise stakeholders. Over time, the role will evolve toward solutions architecture and customer-facing engagement, as you build the domain expertise and relationships that make you the go-to person for designing how Nono fits into complex enterprise environments.

What You'll Do" Contribute directly to the Nono open source project - code, documentation, and architectural proposals. Experiment with different deployment architectures for Nono across cloud environments, on-premise infrastructure, and hybrid setups and share your findings with others at Always Further, and often with the community, via our blogging platforms or YouTube channel. Work closely with early design partners to integrate Nono into proof-of-concept and pilot programmes, gathering feedback and translating it into engineering priorities. Produce technical content - blog posts, architecture guides, demos.

andreyvit 2026/04/02 04:38
泡泡屋 |完全远程 |全职| 200–25 万美元 |首席工程师

Bubblehouse 是一个快速增长的定制忠诚度平台，每年的收入增加两倍。整个团队总部位于纽约，完全远程办公并分布在全球各地。我们为 American Girl 和 Old Spice 等品牌提供忠诚度计划。

我们正在扩大由经验丰富的开发人员组成的精干团队。由于我们提供的定制和灵活性，以及​​我们打算在未来几年保持的步伐和卓越技术，公司正在从其他平台转向。

我们在 Golang 上运行，并在本地键值存储之上使用自定义数据存储，将存储和计算放在专用硬件服务器上，并直接从数据库的映射页面读取数据。如今是否曾遇到过 HN 说人们可以在一台机器上运行 Twitter？我们正在生产中这样做。

零行 React，几乎零第三方依赖（经过仔细审查），每一行 JavaScript 都是在尊重和理解 Web 平台的情况下手动编写的。我们像 2005 年一样在服务器端渲染 HTML。

寻找：

1. 从上到下了解软件堆栈，从现代 Web 平台到 CPU 缓存。

2. 跳出框框思考和解决问题。 （我们并不总是寻求非常规的解决方案，但我们经常这样做，因此需要一个能够在每一步都公正地考虑整个问题空间的人。）

3. 表现出快速学习新事物的能力和渴望。 （每个月我们都在做以前从未做过的事情。）

4. 跨多种编程范例、平台和软件堆栈的丰富经验。

5. 表现出对软件工艺的关注（可以采取多种形式）。

6. 英语口语流利，能够在纽约时区上午 9 点到中午进行交流。

我们为您提供一个名副其实的快节奏环境（几天内即可交付功能），您需要利用实用的先进技术解决极具挑战性的问题，挑战根深蒂固的市场领导者，并帮助小型和大型企业的企业家取悦他们的粉丝。

将纯文本求职信发送至 andrey+hiring@bubblehouse.com。帮助我们了解您如何脱颖而出。总结一下你的经验。链接到 1-5 个您构建并引以为豪的令人印象深刻的东西，链接到我们可以看到您的一些代码的地方，包括您的作品集/简历，描述您擅长的平台和堆栈。您是如何开始编程的？您对技术最感兴趣的是什么？你做过的最有趣或最奇怪的事情是什么？您最强烈的专业观点是什么？请让您的电子邮件易于阅读，我们将不胜感激。

（如果您之前已申请过，无需重新申请，我们会与您联系。）

Bubblehouse | Fully REMOTE | Full-Time | $200–250k | Principal Engineer

Bubblehouse is a fast-growing custom loyalty platform, tripling the revenue each year. Headquartered in NYC, the entire team is fully remote and spread across the globe. We power loyalty programs for brands like American Girl and Old Spice.

We’re expanding our lean team of extremely experienced developers. Companies are switching from other platforms thanks to the customizations and flexibility that we offer, enabled by our pace and technical excellence, which we intend to keep for years to come.

We run on Golang and use custom data storage on top of local key-value stores, colocating the storage and compute on dedicated hardware servers, and reading data directly from mmap’ed pages of the database. Ever came across HN saying that one can run Twitter on a single machine these days? We’re doing that in production.

Zero lines of React, almost zero third-party dependencies (carefully vetted), every line of JavaScript manually written with respect and understanding of the web platform. We render HTML server-side like it’s 2005.

Looking for:

1. Top to bottom understanding of the software stack, from the modern-ish web platform to CPU caches.

2. Thinking and problem solving outside the box. (We don’t _always_ go for unconventional solutions, but we do it often enough to require a person who can do justice considering the entire problem space at every step.)

3. Demonstrated ability and hunger to learn new things quickly. (Every month we’re doing things we have never done before.)

4. Broad experience across multiple programming paradigms, platforms and software stacks.

5. Demonstrated care for the software craftsmanship (which can take many forms).

6. Great spoken English, and ability to communicate 9am to noon in New York time zone.

We give you a literally fast-paced environment (with features delivered in days) where you need to solve very challenging problems with practical advanced technology, take on entrenched market leaders, and help entrepreneurs across small and large businesses delight their fans.

Send a plain text cover letter to andrey+hiring@bubblehouse.com. Help us see how you stand out. Summarize your experience. Link to 1–5 impressive things you’ve built and proud of, link to where we can see some of your code, include your portfolio/CV, describe the platforms and stacks you’re an expert in. How did you start programming? What are you most passionate about in technology? What are the most interesting or weird things you’ve done? What are your strongest held professional opinions? Please make your email easy to read, we’ll appreciate that.

(If you have applied before, no need to re-apply, we’ll reach out.)

logicallee 2026/04/02 02:59
志愿者（无薪）|远程任何地方|基础设施工程师|兼职| https://getinstaprep.com

我们希望通过人工智能养活世界，这是我们的产品理念：

https://taonexus.com/publicfiles/mar2026/render%203-2.webp

https://taonexus.com/publicfiles/mar2026/render%204.webp

我们目前向食品银行捐款，并希望建立端到端的基础设施，以便我们可以向人们的家中提供免费食品。我们的理念是人工智能完成所有工作（包括农业）并免费赠送商品和服务。遇到问题的地方在于谁将生产和分配食物以及人们如何获得食物。虽然我们还没有弄清楚食品配送的所有部分，但我们希望在分销渠道上开展工作。 我们认为这非常重要。

我们正在寻找的是一个热衷于拥有家庭网络基础设施并愿意帮助运行软件堆栈的人，因为目前人工智能还没有足够的天赋来自主运行完整的基础设施堆栈。 这是一个无薪志愿者职位。

你将负责的是食物分配算法、平等、公平以及人类的长远未来。

您可以直接给我发电子邮件：rviragh@gmail.com - 请提及您支持的相关志愿服务或组织。

Volunteer (unpaid) | remote anywhere | Infrastructure Engineer | Part time | https://getinstaprep.com

We'd like to feed the world through AI, here is our product concept:

https://taonexus.com/publicfiles/mar2026/render%203-2.webp

https://taonexus.com/publicfiles/mar2026/render%204.webp

We currently donate money to food banks and would like to set up end-to-end infrastructure so we could deliver free food to people's homes. Our concept is that AI does all the work (including farming) and gives away free goods and services. Where this runs into problems is the question of who's going to make and distribute food and how people are going to get it. While we haven't figured out all parts of food delivery we'd like to work on the distribution channel. We think it's very important.

What we're looking for is someone who is passionate about owning network infrastructure in people's homes and would like to help run the software stack, since at the moment AI is not talented enough to autonomously run the full infrastructure stack. This is an unpaid volunteer position.

What you would be in charge of is food distribution algorithms, equality, fairness, and the long-term future for humanity.

You can email me directly at: rviragh@gmail.com - please mention relevant volunteering or organizations you support.

gabriel_at_hike 2026/04/02 00:55
远足医疗|波士顿或旧金山（现场）|高级+软件工程师

Hike Medical 正在重塑肌肉骨骼护理，从足部开始。我们专有的人工智能视觉平台将 30 秒基于网络（是的，没有传感器）的足部扫​​描转化为精密设计的 3D 打印鞋垫，可在疼痛发生之前预防疼痛。我们已经在保护财富 50 强企业、主要卫生系统和美国中部制造商的现有员工。刚刚与顶级风险投资公司进行了秘密一轮融资，我们在波士顿海港运行着一种快速、无废话、执行第一的文化，我们向着 1 亿美元的 ARR 冲刺，并与 1000 万美国人站在一起，因为他们每天都在走上自己的路。 作为高级软件工程师，您将构建并交付 Hike 人工智能医疗保健平台背后的核心系统。作为 Hike 高增长、任务驱动平台的支柱，您将设计可扩展的服务、实施生产型人工智能并提供可改善患者治疗效果的用户体验。从第一天起，您将拥有真正的自主权，并对美国医疗保健系统的转型产生明显的影响。

你将从事的工作：

* 架构、构建和优化高性能、可扩展的系统，为人工智能驱动的解决方案提供支持。

* 在 TypeScript 和 AWS 环境中设计弹性、无服务器架构。

* 开发开发人员友好的 API 和 SDK，实现跨平台无缝集成。

* 构建和完善高速数据处理管道，推动临床级人工智能洞察。

理想的候选人简介： 技术技能

* AWS 和 TypeScript Expert – 轻松制定基础设施决策、优化云部署以及管理可扩展架构。

* 拥有设计、构建和维护为实时、人工智能驱动的应用程序提供支持的后端系统的经验。

* 在构建和优化面向开发人员的 SDK 和 API 方面拥有丰富的经验。擅长实时数据处理管道和大规模优化系统性能。

* 构建安全、弹性和容错系统的深思熟虑的方法。 有用的特征

* 以产品为中心的工程师 – 您会考虑您的工作如何影响真实用户。

* 强大的沟通者 – 您清楚地解释您的想法，挑战假设，并在工程、人工智能和产品团队之间进行协作。

* 在协作中蓬勃发展——您反驳、提出棘手问题并提升团队。

* 驱动交付——您希望完全控制您的工作，从架构到部署，并且您渴望快速行动。

* 以任务为中心——您不是来优化广告点击的。您想要打造改变生活的技术。

$150K – $225K • 提供股权 • $15k 搬迁奖金（如有必要）

申请： https://jobs.ashbyhq.com/hike-medical/c5a39cb5-fdaa-457d-86d...

Hike Medical | Boston or San Francisco (ONSITE) | Senior+ Software Engineer

Hike Medical is reinventing musculoskeletal care, starting with feet. Our proprietary AI-vision platform turns a 30 second web based (yes, no sensors) foot scan into precision engineered, 3D-printed insoles that prevent pain before it starts. We're already protecting on-their-feet workforces at Fortune 50 leaders, major health systems, and middle America manufacturers. Fresh off a stealthy round with top tier VCs, we run a fast, no BS, execution first culture out of Boston’s Seaport as we sprint toward $100M ARR and standing with 10M Americans as they step into their shoes daily. As a Senior Software Engineer, you’ll build and ship the core systems behind Hike’s AI healthcare platform. As the backbone of Hike's high-growth, mission-driven platform, you’ll design scalable services, implement production AI, and deliver user experiences that improve patient outcomes. From day one, you’ll have real autonomy and clear impact on transforming the US healthcare system.

What You'll Work On:

* Architect, build, and optimize high-performance, scalable systems that power AI-driven solutions.

* Design resilient, serverless architectures in a TypeScript and AWS environment.

* Develop developer-friendly APIs and SDKs that enable seamless integration across platforms.

* Build and refine high-speed data processing pipelines that drive clinical-grade AI insights.

Ideal Candidate Profile: Technical Skills

* AWS & TypeScript Expert – Comfortable making infrastructure decisions, optimizing cloud deployments, and managing scalable architectures.

* Experience designing, building, and maintaining backend systems that power real-time, AI-driven applications.

* Strong experience in building and optimizing developer-facing SDKs and APIs. Skilled in real-time data processing pipelines and optimizing system performance at scale.

* A thoughtful approach to building secure, resilient, and fault-tolerant systems. Helpful Characteristics

* Product-Minded Engineer – You think about how your work impacts real users.

* Strong Communicator – You clearly explain your ideas, challenge assumptions, and collaborate across engineering, AI, and product teams.

* Thrives in Collaboration – You push back, ask tough questions, and elevate the team.

* Driven to Ship – You want full control over your work, from architecture to deployment, and you’re eager to move fast.

* Mission-Focused – You’re not here to optimize ad clicks. You want to build technology that changes lives.

$150K – $225K • Offers Equity • $15k relocation bonus (if necessary)

Apply: https://jobs.ashbyhq.com/hike-medical/c5a39cb5-fdaa-457d-86d...

_puk 2026/04/02 00:48
决斗|技术主管/高级工程师 |英国布里斯托尔（混合动力）

技术堆栈：Angular 迁移到 React |节点/发髻|精英 |蒙戈 |雪花

小团队做大事。

我们已经将团队 AI 原生化，该平台将在几个月内推出。使用“无聊”技术构建的现有 v1 平台使我们能够确保资金和数据的安全，同时确保前端能够以人工智能实现的速度构建。

我们的团队中的一个人正在接受他们过去几年所从事的一切，并在我们的祝福下担任 YC 的主要角色。我们正在寻找他们的替代者，以帮助球队继续达到相同的水平。

我们花了数年时间创建品牌宣传类别，现在在所有领域都看到了巨大的增长。我们去年参加了 A 轮融资，看到了巨大的增长，并且仍然有时间享受乐趣。

你需要支持自己。我们对您抱有很高的期望，但您将获得尽最大努力所需的自主权。 我们专注于雇佣非常聪明、非常可爱的人。

没有招聘人员。就在我们说话的时候，该职位正在空缺（我正在度假，发现正在招聘的人！）；现在，请通过 duel.tech 联系 joe。

Duel | Tech Lead / Staff Engineer | Bristol, UK (Hybrid)

Tech stack: Angular moving to React | Node / Bun | ECS | Mongo | Snowflake

Small team doing big things.

We've taken the team AI native, the platform will be there withing a few months. An existing v1 platform built with "boring" technologies allows us to make sure money and data remain safe whilst ensuring the frontend can be built at the speed that AI enables.

One of our team is taking everything they've been playing with for the last couple of years and stepping in to a YC principal role with our blessing. We're looking for their replacement to help continue bringing the team to the same level.

We've spent years creating the brand advocacy category, and are now seeing huge growth in all areas. We took Series A last year, are seeing massive growth, and still finding the time to have fun.

You need to back yourself. We'll expect a lot form you, but you'll be given the autonomy you need to do your best work. We focus on hiring bloody brilliant, utterly lovely people.

No recruiters. The role is being opened as we speak (I'm on holiday, spotted the who is hiring!); for now, please reach out to: joe via duel.tech.

北岛风险投资|软件工程师|纽约（办公室每周 4 次）|现场

North Island Ventures 是一家专注于加密货币的投资公司。我们正在招聘第二位工程师，与我们的 CTO 一起使用 Python、Typescript 和 React 构建人工智能投资堆栈。我们建立了一个投资代理程序，我们的研究团队已经每天使用该代理程序几个小时，并发现它比使用 Excel 进行建模效率更高。

该职位将涉及全栈工作，并与坐在您旁边的我们的投资团队密切合作，找出如何最好地将法学硕士融入到实际业务中。

如果这听起来很有趣，请在此处申请，并注明您在 HN 上找到了我们！

https://form.typeform.com/to/WDaBGW33

您也可以给我发电子邮件：david [at] Northisland [dot] Ventures

了解更多关于我们的信息： https://northisland.ventures/ 和 https://tech.northisland.ventures/

North Island Ventures | Software Engineer | NYC (4x / wk in office) | ONSITE

North Island Ventures is a crypto-focused investment firm. We are hiring a 2nd engineer to join our CTO in building out an AI investment stack using Python, Typescript, and React. We built out an investment agent that our research team is already using for hours a day, and finding it much more efficient than using Excel for modeling.

The role will involve full stack work and working closely with our investment team - who sit next to you - to figure out how to best integrate LLMs into a real business.

If this sounds interesting please apply here, and mention you found us on HN!

https://form.typeform.com/to/WDaBGW33

You can also email me at david [at] northisland [dot] ventures

Read more on us: https://northisland.ventures/ and https://tech.northisland.ventures/

kaliades 2026/04/02 01:35
更好的数据库（https://betterdb.com) (https://github.com/BetterDB-inc) |创始工程师|远程|全日制

BetterDB 正在为 Valkey 构建工具生态系统，Valkey 是由 AWS、Google 和 Oracle 支持的高性能 Redis 分支。我们从可观察性开始——历史持久性、模式分析、异常检测和 Prometheus 导出——这样您就可以在早上 9 点醒来时调试凌晨 3 点发生的事情。

堆栈：TypeScript、NestJS + Fastify、React、Valkey、PostgreSQL、Docker、Kubernetes、Terraform、AWS。

我们自行托管 OSS 并拥有实时云 SaaS： https://betterdb.com/login 在过去的两个月里，我们平均每周在多个产品和渠道上发布一个以上版本。这就是实践中“快速行动”的样子。

我们上个月聘请了第一位工程师，并希望扩大团队——没有时间压力，我们宁愿找到合适的人。

要申请，首先运行 BetterDB 并使用您的电子邮件作为 npm/docker 的许可证密钥，对于云，只需使用您正在申请的同一电子邮件注册即可。选择最简单的：

  Cloud (no setup): https://betterdb.com/login

  Via npm (includes a built-in installer):
    npx @betterdb/monitor

  Via Docker:
    docker run -d \
      --name betterdb-monitor \
      -p 3001:3001 \
      -e DB_HOST=your-valkey-host \
      -e DB_PORT=6379 \
      -e BETTERDB_LICENSE_KEY=your@email.com \
      betterdb/monitor:latest
然后发送电子邮件至 kristiyan@betterdb.com，介绍一下您自己以及为什么您对此感兴趣。

我一一回复大家。给定的音量可能需要一两天的时间，但您会收到回复。

BetterDB (https://betterdb.com) (https://github.com/BetterDB-inc) | Founding Engineer | Remote | Full-time

BetterDB is building the tooling ecosystem for Valkey, the high-performance Redis fork backed by AWS, Google, and Oracle. We're starting with observability — historical persistence, pattern analysis, anomaly detection, and Prometheus export — so you can debug what happened at 3am when you wake up at 9am.

Stack: TypeScript, NestJS + Fastify, React, Valkey, PostgreSQL, Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform, AWS.

We ship OSS self-hosted and have a live cloud SaaS: https://betterdb.com/login In the last two months we've averaged more than one release per week across multiple products and channels. That's what "moves fast" looks like in practice.

We hired our first engineer last month and are looking to expand the team — no pressure on timeline, we'd rather find the right person.

To apply, first run BetterDB and use your email as the license key for npm/docker, for cloud just register with the same email you are applying. Pick whichever is easiest:

  Cloud (no setup): https://betterdb.com/login

  Via npm (includes a built-in installer):
    npx @betterdb/monitor

  Via Docker:
    docker run -d \
      --name betterdb-monitor \
      -p 3001:3001 \
      -e DB_HOST=your-valkey-host \
      -e DB_PORT=6379 \
      -e BETTERDB_LICENSE_KEY=your@email.com \
      betterdb/monitor:latest
Then email kristiyan@betterdb.com with a bit about yourself and why this is interesting to you.

I reply to everyone. It might take a day or two given volume, but you'll hear back.

FireBeyond 2026/04/02 07:31
> 要申请，首先运行 BetterDB 并使用您的电子邮件作为 npm/docker 的许可证密钥，对于云，只需使用您正在申请的同一电子邮件注册即可。

我明白为什么人们希望有人使用他们的产品来看看他们是否愿意参与其中，但作为一种观察，将其视为一种日益增长的趋势，并且看到“我正在招聘”帖子的一半致力于“嘿，安装我们的产品，这是如何”，这暗示了公司基本上正在为 DAU 收获潜在的求职者......

> To apply, first run BetterDB and use your email as the license key for npm/docker, for cloud just register with the same email you are applying.

I get why people want someone to use their product to see if they'd want to work on it, but as an observation, see this as an increasing trend and seeing half of a "I'm hiring" post dedicated to "Hey, install our product, here's how" gives hints of companies who are basically harvesting potential job candidates for DAUs...

在 HN 中查看
hbjkhgkytfkytv 2026/04/02 10:13
我明白你的意思，但我认为这样问是公平的。你不知道花一小时的时间去采访某人，只是在最后询问（你在这个阶段就知道）是否使用了该产品，而他们说“不”，并且看起来有点羞愧和迟钝，这是多么令人愤怒。

我申请过的每一个地方，我都深深地使用过他们的产品

但就像，你不能问——你只能趟过一百万个白痴。

I get you but I think it's fair to ask. You have no idea how enraging it is to dedicate a whole hour to someone for interview only to ask at the end (you know at this stage) if they used the product and they say "no" and look slightly ashamed and retarded.

Every single place I've ever applied to, I've used their product DEEPLY

But like, you can't ask - you just gotta wade through a million retards.
